Gemini CLI Subagents: Build Free AI Agent Teams in Your Terminal (Claude Code Alternative)

The script explains Google’s Gemini CLI new Subagents feature and shows how to install and start using Gemini CLI for free in the terminal, sign in, restart, and then create and manage teams of specialized AI subagents. It describes how subagents delegate complex or repetitive work in parallel, each with its own context window, system instructions, and tool access to keep the main session focused. The walkthrough covers built-in agents (Generalist, CLI Help, Codebase Investigator), listing agents via /agents, calling agents with @agentname, enabling parallel agents, and creating custom agents by writing a markdown file with settings and guidelines and placing it in the Gemini agents folder, with a caution to avoid multiple agents editing the same files. It ends by promoting the AI Profit Board community for templates, guides, and coaching.

videos.title: UK | 15th April, Wednesday - RIFT Auto-Trading Launch
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 15th April, Wednesday - RIFT Auto-Trading Launch 15/04/26
3FO – The Next-Generation Financial Ecosystem Powered by AI and DeFi

3FO is an innovative digital platform designed to redefine how individuals interact with modern finance. Built at the intersection of artificial intelligence, decentralized finance (DeFi), and blockchain transparency, 3FO provides users with powerful tools to participate in the evolving digital economy and explore new opportunities for wealth creation.

At the core of the 3FO ecosystem is its vision of financial empowerment through accessible technology. The platform combines advanced AI-driven strategies with decentralized infrastructure, enabling users to participate in automated yield systems without needing deep technical knowledge of trading or DeFi protocols.

One of the standout elements of 3FO is the Alpha AI Yield engine, an intelligent system designed to optimize digital asset strategies and manage yield generation across multiple decentralized protocols. By leveraging adaptive algorithms and diversified deployment strategies, Alpha AI continuously analyzes market conditions and allocates capital in ways intended to maximize efficiency and performance.

3FO also introduces an integrated financial framework that brings together several powerful components within one ecosystem. These include LQUIDPAY, a self-custodial DeFi banking environment that enables global transactions, crypto spending, and on-chain yield opportunities, and Protocol Yield, a performance-focused platform designed to provide transparent, traceable returns powered by decentralized financial strategies.

Another key feature of the platform is its emphasis on transparency and user control. Because the system operates on blockchain infrastructure, users can view earnings and transactions in real time, providing visibility into how digital assets move and generate yield across the network.

3FO is also built with scalability and collaboration in mind. Through its network-driven model, participants can expand their engagement within the ecosystem while benefiting from a structure designed to encourage shared growth and collective success.

With a focus on AI automation, decentralized finance innovation, and user-controlled digital banking, 3FO aims to create a comprehensive financial environment where technology works continuously to support smarter asset management and new economic opportunities.

As the global financial landscape evolves toward blockchain-based systems, 3FO positions itself as a forward-thinking platform that merges cutting-edge technology with accessible financial tools—empowering individuals to participate in the future of programmable money and decentralized wealth creation. 15/04/26

videos.title: Energy bars in 15 minutes. NO added sugar. Natural. Protein-packed and delicious.
videos.summary_source_text:
Energy bars in 15 minutes. NO added sugar. Natural. Protein-packed and delicious. Energy bars in 15 minutes. NO added sugar. Natural. Protein-packed and delicious.

1/2 cup (60 g) hazelnuts.
1/3 cup (50 g) peanuts.
1/4 cup (40 g) prunes.
1/2 cup (60 g) rolled oats.
1/3 cup (80 g) dates.
1 tablespoon cocoa.
1/4 cup (60 ml) coconut milk.
1 fresh banana.
Bake in a preheated oven at 360F/180C for 20 minutes.
2.6 oz (75 g) sugar-free dark chocolate.
Let set until firm.

videos.title: NHL Without a Map – Season 14, Jakso 11: Leijonalegenda Mikael Granlund & Suomi-kiekon tulevaisuus
videos.summary_source_text:
NHL Without a Map – Season 14, Jakso 11: Leijonalegenda Mikael Granlund & Suomi-kiekon tulevaisuus Hollywood jää taakse ja suuntaamme kohti Anaheimia. Luksus vaihtuu hieman vaatimattomampaan hotellielämään. Pienen jännityksen kautta aamu valkenee kuitenkin Kalifornian auringossa, ja päivä startataan tyylikkäästi aamu-uinnilla Buena Parkissa. Anaheimissa ohjelmassa on paljon muutakin kuin turistimeininkiä. Nousemme Newport Coastin kukkuloille tapaamaan suomalaista NHL-tähteä Mikael Granlundia, joka avaa ajatuksiaan urasta, Kalifornia-elämästä ja voittamisen mindsetistä – sekä muistelee Leijonien ikimuistoisimpia hetkiä. 

Illalla suuntaamme legendaariselle Honda Centerille, jossa luvassa on kiihkeä paikallisottelu Anaheim Ducks vs. Los Angeles Kings. Suomalaisittain katseet kohdistuvat erityisesti maalinsuulle, kun Ville Husso saa tilaisuutensa loistaa – ja millä tavalla loistaakaan. Tiukka kamppailu venyy aina rankkareille asti, ja ilta huipentuu huikeaan ratkaisuun sekä Husson tunnelmiin pukukopissa pelin jälkeen.
***

The host shows how to install and run Kimi from the terminal, access the K2.6 preview in the console, generate an API key, and plug it into OpenClaw and other agents, noting Claude’s recent restrictions on third‑party agent access. videos.title: Are the Rapids and Matt Wells REAL Contenders? Houston and US Open Cup Recap & Messi Preview
videos.summary_source_text:
Are the Rapids and Matt Wells REAL Contenders? Houston and US Open Cup Recap & Messi Preview The Colorado Rapids just put the league on notice. After a wild ref induced 3-2 loss in Toronto, Matt Wells’ squad returned to Dick’s Sporting Goods Park and absolutely dismantled the Houston Dynamo in a 6-2 thrashing. Plus, we got our first taste of US Open Cup in a long while.
In today’s episode, the DNVR Rapids crew breaks down the "6-pack" win, Georgi Minoungou’s electric debut, and whether this team is a legitimate Western Conference contender. Plus, we look ahead to the massive 30th Anniversary match at Empower Field against Lionel Messi and Inter Miami.
Topics on today's show:
• The Big Takeaways: Is this the most entertaining Rapids team ever?
• Toronto Heartbreak: What went wrong in the 3-2 loss at BMO Field?
• Houston Beatdown: Analyzing the 6-2 explosion and new signings Kosi Thompson and Georgi Minoungou making an immediate impact.
• U.S. Open Cup: Can the Rapids make a deep run this year?
• Record Watch: Is Rafael Navarro on track to break the Rapids' single-season scoring record?
• Messi is Coming: Previewing the Inter Miami clash at Mile High.
• Transfer Rumors: Is Sam Kerr actually coming to the Denver Summit FC and NWSL?
• New Kid on the Block: Early impressions of $2M signing Georgi Minoungou.
• The Verdict: Are the 'Pids for real?

Rapids hot: 3:30

videos.title: Hindi | 15th April, Tuesday - RIFT Auto-Trading Launch
videos.summary_source_text:
Hindi | 15th April, Tuesday - RIFT Auto-Trading Launch 15/04/26
3FO – The Next-Generation Financial Ecosystem Powered by AI and DeFi

3FO is an innovative digital platform designed to redefine how individuals interact with modern finance. Built at the intersection of artificial intelligence, decentralized finance (DeFi), and blockchain transparency, 3FO provides users with powerful tools to participate in the evolving digital economy and explore new opportunities for wealth creation.

At the core of the 3FO ecosystem is its vision of financial empowerment through accessible technology. The platform combines advanced AI-driven strategies with decentralized infrastructure, enabling users to participate in automated yield systems without needing deep technical knowledge of trading or DeFi protocols.

One of the standout elements of 3FO is the Alpha AI Yield engine, an intelligent system designed to optimize digital asset strategies and manage yield generation across multiple decentralized protocols. By leveraging adaptive algorithms and diversified deployment strategies, Alpha AI continuously analyzes market conditions and allocates capital in ways intended to maximize efficiency and performance.

3FO also introduces an integrated financial framework that brings together several powerful components within one ecosystem. These include LQUIDPAY, a self-custodial DeFi banking environment that enables global transactions, crypto spending, and on-chain yield opportunities, and Protocol Yield, a performance-focused platform designed to provide transparent, traceable returns powered by decentralized financial strategies.

Another key feature of the platform is its emphasis on transparency and user control. Because the system operates on blockchain infrastructure, users can view earnings and transactions in real time, providing visibility into how digital assets move and generate yield across the network.

3FO is also built with scalability and collaboration in mind. Through its network-driven model, participants can expand their engagement within the ecosystem while benefiting from a structure designed to encourage shared growth and collective success.

With a focus on AI automation, decentralized finance innovation, and user-controlled digital banking, 3FO aims to create a comprehensive financial environment where technology works continuously to support smarter asset management and new economic opportunities.

As the global financial landscape evolves toward blockchain-based systems, 3FO positions itself as a forward-thinking platform that merges cutting-edge technology with accessible financial tools—empowering individuals to participate in the future of programmable money and decentralized wealth creation. 15/04/26

By leveraging adaptive algorithms and diversified deployment strategies, Alpha AI continuously analyzes market conditions and allocates capital in ways intended to maximize efficiency and performance.

3FO also introduces an integrated financial framework that brings together several powerful components within one ecosystem. These include LQUIDPAY, a self-custodial DeFi banking environment that enables global transactions, crypto spending, and on-chain yield opportunities, and Protocol Yield, a performance-focused platform designed to provide transparent, traceable returns powered by decentralized financial strategies.

Another key feature of the platform is its emphasis on transparency and user control. Because the system operates on blockchain infrastructure, users can view earnings and transactions in real time, providing visibility into how digital assets move and generate yield across the network.

3FO is also built with scalability and collaboration in mind. Through its network-driven model, participants can expand their engagement within the ecosystem while benefiting from a structure designed to encourage shared growth and collective success.

With a focus on AI automation, decentralized finance innovation, and user-controlled digital banking, 3FO aims to create a comprehensive financial environment where technology works continuously to support smarter asset management and new economic opportunities.

As the global financial landscape evolves toward blockchain-based systems, 3FO positions itself as a forward-thinking platform that merges cutting-edge technology with accessible financial tools—empowering individuals to participate in the future of programmable money and decentralized wealth creation.

videos.title: The Last Day of the Regular Season Will Decide the Avalanche Round 1 Opponent
videos.summary_source_text:
The Last Day of the Regular Season Will Decide the Avalanche Round 1 Opponent The Colorado Avalanche face playoff uncertainty as the Pacific Division chaos intensifies—will it be the Kings, Ducks, or Oilers in Round 1? Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson break down wild tiebreaker scenarios, analyze key matchups, and weigh which opponent gives the Avalanche the best path forward. Is facing Connor McDavid and the Edmonton Oilers the greatest risk, or do the Los Angeles Kings present a more favorable showdown?

Listener questions spark spirited debate about Dallas Stars, Minnesota Wild, and “Cup or bust” mentalities, plus a heated comparison between Mikko Rantanen and Martin Nečas following their blockbuster swap. The episode also features bold predictions for the NHL playoffs, insights into Stanley Cup threats from the Eastern Conference like the Carolina Hurricanes and Tampa Bay Lightning, and a dose of locker room stories and fan humor. Are the Avalanche primed for a deep run—or will playoff surprises upend expectations?

videos.title: Stars Beat Sabres 4-3 In Shootout To Reach 50 Wins In Regular Season Finale | DLLS STARS POSTGAME
videos.summary_source_text:
Stars Beat Sabres 4-3 In Shootout To Reach 50 Wins In Regular Season Finale | DLLS STARS POSTGAME Check out Fran Duffy’s 2026 Diehard Draft Guide! https://alldlls.com/draftguide26/

The Dallas Stars recorded their 50th win of the 2025-26 regular season as they beat the Buffalo Sabres 4-3 in a shootout on Wednesday night at KeyBank Center. Mavrik Bourque opened the scoring with his 20th goal of the season. Trailing 2-1 in the second period, Esa Lindell scored a power play goal. After the Sabres answered for a 3-2 lead, Justin Hrykowian tied the game at 3-3. Neither team scored in the third period or overtime. Jason Robertson, Matt Duchene and Wyatt Johnston all scored in the shootout to give Dallas the victory. Join the DLLS Stars Post Game Show as we recap all the main storylines, provide comprehensive breakdowns of key plays and we take your Super Chats!

Google Gemini App for Mac: Screen Sharing, Option+Space Shortcut & Built‑In Image/Video Creation

Google has released a new Gemini app for Mac, letting users sign in and use Gemini directly on desktop instead of the browser. The script demos two standout features: sharing a window to give Gemini instant on-screen context (so it can summarize, explain, and generate outputs based on what’s visible) and a system-wide shortcut (Option + Space) that opens a floating Gemini chat from anywhere. It also shows generating images automatically from the shared context and using tools like Canvas for tasks such as website redesigns and SEO audits by analyzing on-screen analytics without copying and pasting. The app syncs chat history and media, integrates “My Stuff,” supports Google Drive/Photos, and can load NotebookLM notebooks. The video notes the trend of major AI models shipping desktop “super apps,” and links to a fuller guide and an AI automation community.

videos.title: Matthew Tkachuk Meets Media for Final Time This Season After Panthers Rout of Red Wings
videos.summary_source_text:
Matthew Tkachuk Meets Media for Final Time This Season After Panthers Rout of Red Wings Florida Panthers forward Matthew Tkachuk meets the media after his team drilled the visiting Detroit Red Wings 8-1 in the 2025-26 final game on Wednesday, April 15, 2026. 

The Panthers won three straight to end the season. 

Luke Kunin had two goals and an assist; rookie Mike Benning scored twice. Marek Alscher, Matthew Tkachuk, Cole Reinhardt, and Wilmer Skoog all had two-point nights. 

Daniil Tarasov had 24 saves for his third straight win. 

The two-time Stanley Cup champions will miss the playoffs for the first time since 2019. 

Video Courtesy Florida Panthers / @FlaPanthers / Panthers Vision

videos.title: Sam Steel Returns From Injury For Regular Season Finale In Buffalo – Game 82 | DLLS STARS PREGAME
videos.summary_source_text:
Sam Steel Returns From Injury For Regular Season Finale In Buffalo – Game 82 | DLLS STARS PREGAME Check out Fran Duffy’s 2026 Diehard Draft Guide! https://alldlls.com/draftguide26/

One more regular season game and then it’s on to the playoffs! The Dallas Stars will face the Buffalo Sabres tonight at KeyBank Center (6 p.m. CT) in both team’s 82nd game of the 2025-26 season. The Stars have won four games in a row and have a chance to reach the 50-win mark for the third consecutive season, something only five teams have accomplished in NHL history. The Sabres have executed a dramatic about-face this season. On December 8th they were in last place in the Eastern Conference and ranked 30th in the entire league. Since then, Buffalo caught fire, had a franchise-record 10 game winning streak along with another eight-game winning streak, posting an NHL-best 39-9-4 record (82 pts., 0.788) over their last 52 games. On tonight’s DLLS Stars Pregame Show, we will discuss all the big storylines, we will take a look at the expected lineups, we will hear from Stars head coach Glen Gulutzan about the latest injury updates about Roope Hintz & Miro Heiskanen and from Sabres head coach Lindy Ruff on his choice to rest some players in preparation for their first round playoff series against the Boston Bruins. Expected starting goaltenders: Jake Oettinger (DAL) vs. Colton Ellis (BUF).

videos.title: R&B Star Keenan Trevon Talks Music Journey, Buy Me Flowers Tour & Supporting Local | Weekly Cut
videos.summary_source_text:
R&B Star Keenan Trevon Talks Music Journey, Buy Me Flowers Tour & Supporting Local | Weekly Cut This week on Weekly Cut, Justin Simmons and Louis Romero sit down with rising Denver R&B artist Keenan Trevon for an inspiring conversation about music, motivation, and what it takes to chase your dreams. From Motown family roots to building his name in Denver and Aurora, Keenan shares the personal story behind his rise and what’s next with the Buy Me Flowers Tour.

Keenan opens up about the artists who shaped his sound, the emotional process behind creating music, why live performances are so powerful, and how fans can truly support independent artists in today’s streaming era. If you love music, local culture, and authentic stories, this is an episode you don’t want to miss.

videos.summary_source_text:

videos.title: How Train 2.0 Revolutionized Hockey Skill Development Coaching
videos.summary_source_text:
How Train 2.0 Revolutionized Hockey Skill Development Coaching The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: Google New Gemini Skillz Turn Chrome Into an AI Beast
videos.summary_source_text:
Google New Gemini Skillz Turn Chrome Into an AI Beast 👉 Try Seedance 2.0 on Higgsfield: https://higgsfield.ai/s/seedance-2-0-airevolutionx-yDYwTG
Google just dropped one of its biggest AI stretches in a while, and this one goes far beyond a simple model update. Chrome now gets Gemini Skills for reusable workflows, Gemini Enterprise is testing a new Agent tab, NotebookLM is adding Canvas and Connectors, DeepMind upgraded Gemini Robotics-ER 1.6 for real-world robotics, and Google Research introduced Vantage for measuring collaboration, creativity, and critical thinking. This is where Google starts turning Gemini into something much bigger than a chatbot.

📩 Brand Deals & Partnerships: collabs@nouralabs.com
✉ General Inquiries: airevolutionofficial@gmail.com
🚀 New Channel: https://www.youtube.com/@science.revolution

🧠 What You’ll See
0:00 Intro
0:31 Gemini Skills in Chrome
SOURCE: https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/chrome/skills-in-chrome/
1:59 Multi-Tab Prompts & Built-In Library
4:39 Gemini Enterprise Agent tab
SOURCE: https://www.testingcatalog.com/google-is-quietly-testing-gemini-agents-with-a-brand-new-agent-tab/
5:30 Toward a Full Desktop Agent

SOURCE: https://www.testingcatalog.com/google-tests-canvas-and-connectors-on-notebooklm/

videos.title: "I Smuggled the Corkscrew Into USA Hockey's Learn-to-Skate" | Matt Lieber
videos.summary_source_text:
"I Smuggled the Corkscrew Into USA Hockey's Learn-to-Skate" | Matt Lieber "I Smuggled the Corkscrew Into USA Hockey's Learn-to-Skate" | Matt Lieber

In this episode of the Train 2.0 Show, Kevin McKinnon sits down with Matt Lieber, a former college teacher, hockey dad, Train 2.0 certified coach, and founder of Train 2.0 Hockey CT out of New Haven, Connecticut.

Matt's story is a great one: he coached bantam hockey after college, spent decades in education, and got back into the game through his son. After becoming a Train 2.0 member himself and seeing the gap between what he was being taught and what he was seeing his son's coaches teach, he decided to get certified and build a coaching business from the ground up, all in his 50s.

In this conversation we cover:
→ Matt's journey from educator to full-time hockey coach.
→ How video analysis completely changed his coaching effectiveness.
→ Why "fewer cues, more posture-focused cues" is the secret to player development.
→ Regressions, progressions, and how to assess a player in 10 seconds.
→ The girls he's coached who made Tier 2 national teams and "most improved" awards.
→ How he smuggled the corkscrew into the USA Hockey Learn-to-Skate curriculum.
→ Why the Train 2.0 coaching community is a differentiator.
→ Advice for coaches on the fence about certification.

If you're a coach, hockey parent, or player who's ever wondered what becoming a Train 2.0 certified coach really looks like, this episode is for you.

videos.title: The Most Overlooked Puck Protection Skill
videos.summary_source_text:
The Most Overlooked Puck Protection Skill The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: 3x World Long Drive Champ FIXED My Speed Training
videos.summary_source_text:
3x World Long Drive Champ FIXED My Speed Training Have I been speed training wrong?  A 55-year-old, 3x World Long Drive Champion showed me a completely different approach and new training program HIITS https://bit.ly/hiits-golfwell

I flew to Orlando to train with Fast Eddie Fernandes. Eddie is a 55-year-old, 3x World Long Drive Champion who developed the HIITS driver after years of trial and error with speed training. His approach is different from anything I've tried. You hit real golf balls at max effort using a weighted driver system (light, medium, heavy) instead of swinging at air. We did a full speed session, 24 swings, and Eddie showed me a 5-minute Rotex warmup that replaces the 25-30 minute gym routine I was doing at home.

Whether you're trying to swing faster, add distance, or just want a smarter approach to speed training that won't wreck your body, this is the full protocol from a guy who's been #1 in the world for over 200 weeks.

What you'll learn:
→ Why hitting balls at speed beats swinging at air for speed gains
→ The 5-minute Rotex warmup that replaces 30 minutes in the gym
→ How the HIITS driver works (light, medium, heavy protocol)
→ Why "more is better" is wrong for speed training
→ The 8-16 week timeline for turning peak speed into cruise speed
→ What the gap between training speed and on-course speed should look like
→ Why softer wrists and a relaxed trail arm unlock more club speed
→ Eddie's journey from Q-School and mini tours to 3x World Long Drive Champion

🔗 Try the HIITS Driver: https://bit.ly/hiits-golfwell
🔗 Follow Fast Eddie: https://www.instagram.com/fasteddie480/

videos.title: NEW Playoff Injury News, Jokic Talks Anthony Edwards & Timberwolves + More | Inside Nuggets Practice
videos.summary_source_text:
NEW Playoff Injury News, Jokic Talks Anthony Edwards & Timberwolves + More | Inside Nuggets Practice Get the latest Denver Nuggets playoff injury news from Ball Arena as Nikola Jokic and the No. 3 seed Nuggets get ready for Game 1 against Anthony Edwards and the No. 6 seed Minnesota Timberwolves on Saturday, April 18. Brendan Vogt breaks down everything from Nuggets practice, including David Adelman’s updates on Peyton Watson and Spencer Jones, plus what their statuses could mean for Denver’s first-round playoff rotation. Hear Jokic’s thoughts on Edwards, Rudy Gobert, and Denver’s playoff mindset after the Nuggets won the regular-season series 3-1 over Minnesota. Subscribe for more Denver Nuggets practice notes, Timberwolves playoff coverage, Nikola Jokic quotes, and nonstop NBA Playoffs analysis all series long. Go inside Denver Nuggets practice with Brendan Vogt for the latest Denver Nuggets news.

videos.title: Rielly Trade Talk, Status of the Yzer-plan & San Jose's next steps | DFO Rundown Insider Edition
videos.summary_source_text:
Rielly Trade Talk, Status of the Yzer-plan & San Jose's next steps | DFO Rundown Insider Edition The Stanley Cup Playoffs are set, but the offseason is almost underway for half the league. On this episode of the DFO Rundown Insider Edition, we dive into the massive summer ahead for the Toronto Maple Leafs, from their search for new leadership to the possibility of a major roster shakeup. What does the future hold for Auston Matthews, and is it finally time to consider moving Morgan Rielly? With a retool on the horizon, the pressure is on to build a contender fast.

We also head to Vancouver, where the Canucks are embracing a full rebuild amid questions about leadership, culture, and what comes next. Plus, we break down what’s ahead for the Detroit Red Wings as the Yzer-plan continues its slow build, and why the San Jose Sharks could be aggressive in reshaping their blue line. With playoff picks, offseason speculation, and insider notes from around the league, this episode

Meet our insiders: Irfaan Gaffar of Daily Faceoff, Canucks Army, & Rink Wide Vancouver is joined by David Pagnotta of The Fourth Period, SiriusXM NHL, and NHL Network. They look around the NHL, reacting to the week's news and digging into the contracts, trades, and moves that are still on the horizon.

videos.title: 1 Scoop a Day — Clear Brain Fog, Boost Energy & Get Your Blood Flow Back
videos.summary_source_text:
1 Scoop a Day — Clear Brain Fog, Boost Energy & Get Your Blood Flow Back What if one simple daily habit could help clear brain fog, boost your energy, and restore healthy blood flow throughout your body? This powerful natural powder comes from raw cacao, one of the richest sources of flavanols, magnesium, and polyphenols found in nature. These compounds work deep inside your body by supporting nitric oxide production, helping your blood vessels relax and open so oxygen and nutrients can reach your brain, heart, and muscles more efficiently. The result is better mental clarity, improved focus, sustained energy, and healthier circulation from head to toe. Cacao also supports insulin sensitivity, helping stabilize blood sugar levels while reducing oxidative stress that contributes to fatigue and aging. Its natural compounds like epicatechin and theobromine enhance mood, promote relaxation, and support overall cognitive performance, while its prebiotic effects help nourish your gut microbiome, strengthening digestion and immune health. Whether you add it to your morning smoothie, yogurt, or oatmeal, just one daily scoop of high-quality, unsweetened cacao can help your body function at a higher level. Start with a small amount, especially if you are sensitive to stimulants, and take it earlier in the day for best results. This video is for educational purposes only and is not medical advice. Always consult your healthcare professional before making changes to your diet or health routine.

videos.summary_source_text:
How The Dallas Mavericks Can Improve Their Offense Around Cooper Flagg | DLLS Mavs Podcast Check out Fran Duffy’s 2026 Diehard Draft Guide! https://alldlls.com/draftguide26/

Dallas Mavericks rookie Cooper Flagg had an excellent debut NBA season. How can the Mavs improve their offense around Flagg heading into his second year? The DLLS Mavs crew emphasizes the importance of more 3-point shooting and how that can impact Flagg’s game. Plus, they discuss the team’s connection to Timberwolves executive Tim Connelly and they take another Tankathon spin, live on YouTube.

#cooperflagg #dallasmavs #nba #pjwashington #danielgafford #klaythompson #najimarshall #jasonkidd #khrismiddleton #kyrieirving #marvinbagley #derecklively

videos.title: Rick Bowness Snaps and Ovechkin's Future ft. Tarik El-Bashir | The Sheet with Jeff Marek
videos.summary_source_text:
Rick Bowness Snaps and Ovechkin's Future ft. Tarik El-Bashir | The Sheet with Jeff Marek Jeff Marek is back with another edition of The Sheet, diving into one of the biggest looming questions around the NHL right now — the future of Alex Ovechkin. Marek is joined by Tarik El‑Bashir to break down what comes next for the Washington captain and whether Tuesday night’s game against the Columbus Blue Jackets may have been Ovechkin’s final appearance in the NHL. The conversation explores what the next chapter could look like for the Washington Capitals — both with Ovechkin still in the picture and in a future where the franchise turns the page from one of the greatest goal scorers in hockey history. Later in the show, Marek reacts to the stunning post-game moment from Rick Bowness following the Blue Jackets’ final game of the season, unpacking the emotion behind his fiery comments to the media, why he chose that moment to speak out, and what it says about the state of the organization moving forward.

#NHL #AlexOvechkin #Capitals #WashingtonCapitals #BlueJackets #RickBowness #Hockey #NHLNews #TheSheet #DailyFaceoff

videos.title: David Duval “Cover The Ball”
videos.summary_source_text:
David Duval “Cover The Ball” David Duval had a special on Golf Channel a few years back, where he was talking about how he hit the driver amazing. And his feeling was that once he got from the top, He felt like the club started to steepen up. The right shoulder came on top like everything covered on top of this golf ball. Now for pros, that's good... for recreational golfers. That may be an absolute disaster. 
I recommend you use a training aid that is designed for recreational players like the Blue Brick, to ensure you are more in line with how the pros swing. Check it out here 🔗➡️ https://bit.ly/bluebrickgolf David Duval had a special on Golf Channel a few years back, where he was talking about how he hit the driver amazing. Check out Fran Duffy’s 2026 Diehard Draft Guide! https://alldlls.com/draftguide26/

Dane Brugler joins the show today to talk Cowboys draft strategy, names to watch, and what Dallas could be planning next week. Plus, three new mock drafts from major analysts all have the Cowboys making the same aggressive trade-up move for one player — coincidence or a sign of what’s coming? We’ll break down why the buzz is building around Dallas making a splash.

We’ll also dive into Stephen Jones’ latest comments on George Pickens and why he says there are no trade suitors for the star receiver right now. Is that reality, leverage, or classic pre-draft messaging from The Star? Plenty to discuss as the Cowboys sit in the middle of one of the most fascinating draft weeks in years.

videos.title: DRÖMKÖPET SOM SPÅRADE UR! Skulle jag köpt en elbil?
videos.summary_source_text:
DRÖMKÖPET SOM SPÅRADE UR! Skulle jag köpt en elbil? Att importera en drömbil kan se enkelt ut på pappret, men verkligheten på Autobahn är ofta en annan. Efter 40 år som motorjournalist borde jag ha förutsett strulet, men passionen för den sällsynta saffransgula Volvo C70:n tog överhanden. Följ med på en resa som börjar med ett lyckat köp i Berlin men som snabbt eskalerar till missljud, akuta verkstadsbesök hos "Auto Herbst" och en nervös väntan på reservdelar. Det här är den osminkade sanningen om bilimport: från den glödande lacken i vårsolen till den bittra fakturan och kampen för att ens ta sig över Öresundsbron.

Bli gärna medlem och stöd kanalen, som blir reklamfri! 29 kr/månad
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCU-4UJDGqQWK5Iv4wXDlzGQ/join

⚡️ Köp eller sälj elbil via Carla: https://carla.se
📉 Kolla vad din bil är värd hos Bilpriser: https://bilpriser.se
🔌 Smartare laddlösningar från Phasebox: https://phasebox.se
Haveri på vägen?
Som ni såg i filmen kan vad som helst hända med en 26 år gammal bil. Se till att ha ordning på grejerna du också:
https://www.mekonomen.se

00:00:00 – Inledningen: Den bittra insikten på verkstaden – vad är det som låter? []
00:00:23 – Mötet med René: Köpet genomförs och vi tar adjö av den tidigare ägaren i Berlin. []
00:01:03 – Katastrofen börjar: Första stoppet på Autobahn. Missljudet som inte går att ignorera. []
00:01:30 – Diagnosen: Vi hittar felet – ett hjullager som gett upp helt efter bara några mil. []
00:02:32 – Verkstadsjakt: Panik i Berlin – ringer runt till tyska Volvo-verkstäder på knagglig tyska. []
00:04:12 – Auto Herbst: Bilen rullar in på lyften. En första titt på undersidan av importen. []
00:06:49 – Berlin-paus: En ofrivillig sightseeing i väntan på delar. Checkpoint Charlie och muren. []
00:09:16 – Samtalet: En reflektion över pris, skick och varför man köper en 25 år gammal Volvo. []
01:11:52 – Reparationen: Delarna har kommit! Hjullagerbyte och en faktura på 485 Euro. []
01:17:40 – Frihet: Vi lämnar Berlin och trycker gasen i botten mot färjan i Puttgarden. []
01:22:06 – Varningen: Historien om norrmannen som förlorade sin Lamborghini – vi håller hastigheten. []
01:25:52 – Öresundsbron: Den vackra men nervösa sista etappen hem mot Sverige. []
01:26:40 – Hemma: En sammanfattning av resan och vad som väntar härnäst för C70:n. []

videos.title: Bones Has Beef In Columbus & More Eastern Matchups Get Locked In | Daily Faceoff Live
videos.summary_source_text:
Bones Has Beef In Columbus & More Eastern Matchups Get Locked In | Daily Faceoff Live Welcome to Daily Faceoff Live!

Rick Bowness didn’t hold back.

After Game 82, Bowness publicly called out the Columbus Blue Jackets — and now the big question is what changes could be coming in Columbus this summer. We break down what went wrong and which moves could reshape the Blue Jackets heading into next season.

In the Western Conference, injury concerns are already creating uncertainty. The Dallas Stars will be without Roope Hintz for Games 1 and 2, and Miro Heiskanen’s status remains unclear. How much does this shift the balance in the Stars vs Wild series — and does Minnesota suddenly become the favorite?

We also rank the NHL’s biggest disappointments and debate which teams — Toronto, Winnipeg, Nashville, Detroit, and New Jersey — will look the most different next season.

In The Film Room, we take a closer look at key playoff matchups, including Pittsburgh vs Philadelphia and Montreal vs Tampa Bay. Which teams hold the biggest advantages, and what will it take for underdogs to pull off an upset?

videos.title: Michelle Khare Eats the Spiciest Meal of Her Life | Heat Eaters
videos.summary_source_text:
Michelle Khare Eats the Spiciest Meal of Her Life | Heat Eaters Strap in - the Internet’s favorite stuntwoman, @MichelleKhare , is about to face her most dangerous mission yet: Chef Esther Choi’s kitchen. Michelle Khare is trading her harness for a fork as Esther serves up a fiery three-course gauntlet: spicy mushroom tempura, butter chicken & samosas, and a Last Dab lobster arrabiata.

While fighting through the spice, Michelle and Esther revisit her most death-defying feats - from escaping Houdini’s water tank to literally hanging off the side of a plane, and chef Esther puts Michelle through a spice-induced IQ quiz to see if she can retain any knowledge while her body goes into survival mode.

videos.title: Alla sa att jag skulle köpa elbil – jag importerade en svensk klassiker istället!
videos.summary_source_text:
Alla sa att jag skulle köpa elbil – jag importerade en svensk klassiker istället! Efter 40 år i branschen borde jag veta bättre än att köpa en 26 år gammal coupé i mörkret. Men när man står framför en av de bara 2 000 tillverkade saffransgula Volvo C70-coupéerna, så talar hjärtat högre än hjärnan. Följ med på en premiärtur som börjar i ren nostalgi utanför Berlin, men som snabbt förvandlas till en nervös väntan på tyska verkstäder. Det är en berättelse om svensk designhistoria, brittiskt chassikunnande och den tunna linjen mellan att äga en klassiker och att bli ägd av den.

Se del två direkt om du är medlem!

Bli gärna medlem och stöd kanalen, som blir reklamfri! 29 kr/månad
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCU-4UJDGqQWK5Iv4wXDlzGQ/join

⚡️ Köp eller sälj elbil via Carla: https://carla.se
📉 Kolla vad din bil är värd hos Bilpriser: https://bilpriser.se
🔌 Smartare laddlösningar från Phasebox: https://phasebox.se
Haveri på vägen?
Som ni såg i filmen kan vad som helst hända med en 26 år gammal bil. Se till att ha ordning på grejerna du också:
https://www.mekonomen.se

00:00:00 – Prolog: Den första varningssignalen på Autobahn – något svarvar och det låter illa.
00:00:23 – Bakgrunden: Varför jag sålde min Lexus och började leta efter en "sleeper".
00:00:54 – Avslöjandet: Här står den – en Volvo C70 Coupé från år 2000 i den rätta saffranslacken.
00:01:30 – Första mötet: Köp i mörker och en genomgång av bilens skick med den enda tidigare ägaren René.
00:02:40 – Besiktning: Genomgång av reservhjul balja och rostskydd (eller brist på behovet av det).
00:03:15 – Interiör & Service: 16 000 mil på mätaren, men varför lyser servicelampan?
00:03:40 – Historiklektion: Från Trabantresor till Moskva till köpet av en modern klassiker.
00:04:42 – Dagen efter: Pappersarbete, banköverföringar och utmaningen med att exportera bil från Tyskland.
00:05:29 – Provkörningen: Första gången bakom ratten i dagsljus – hur känns chassit och bromsarna?
00:06:20 – Pris & Strategi: Vad kostade lyxen år 2000 kontra idag? Och varför valdes bättre ljud framför navigation?
00:07:35 – Designanalys: Volvo går från fyrkantigt till känslomässigt – arvet från TWR och Uddevalla.
00:08:55 – Framtidsplaner: Trimning, lackfix och drömmen om att maximera "bil-livet".
00:09:30 – Vändningen: Resan hemåt börjar, men vi hinner bara 10 minuter innan vi landar på verkstaden... för första gången.

Men när man står framför en av de bara 2 000 tillverkade saffransgula Volvo C70-coupéerna, så talar hjärtat högre än hjärnan. Följ med på en premiärtur som börjar i ren nostalgi utanför Berlin, men som snabbt förvandlas till en nervös väntan på tyska verkstäder. Det är en berättelse om svensk designhistoria, brittiskt chassikunnande och den tunna linjen mellan att äga en klassiker och att bli ägd av den.

videos.title: Sam Reinhart Meets Florida Panthers Media for Final Time in 2025-26 NHL Season
videos.summary_source_text:
Sam Reinhart Meets Florida Panthers Media for Final Time in 2025-26 NHL Season Florida Panthers forward Sam Reinhart meets the media for the final time during the 2025-26 season on Wednesday, April 15, 2026. 

Reinhart has been out of the Panthers lineup with a foot injury the past few weeks.

The Panthers play host to the Detroit Red Wings tonight and have won two straight. They got more bad injury news with Tomas Nosek and Gus Forsling both out tonight. 

Matthew Tkachuk returns after missing the past four games on paternity leave. 

Video Courtesy Florida Panthers / @FlaPanthers / Panthers Vision

videos.title: East Is Set & Bowness Rants ft. Marco D'Amico & John Buccigross | Morning Cuppa Hockey
videos.summary_source_text:
East Is Set & Bowness Rants ft. Marco D'Amico & John Buccigross | Morning Cuppa Hockey In today’s episode of Morning Cuppa Hockey, Jonny Lazarus and Colby Cohen break down the fallout from Rick Bowness’s "scorched earth" press conference in Columbus. The guys dive deep into the coach’s viral rant, questioning whether Bowness will actually return for another season and what his critique of the Blue Jackets' culture means for the locker room. 

Marco D’Amico drops by to provide an inside look at the Montreal Canadiens as they prepare for a heavyweight first-round clash with the Tampa Bay Lightning, analyzing whether Montreal’s youth can handle the playoff-tested Bolts. 

Finally, the legendary John Buccigross joins the show to survey the finalized Eastern Conference playoff picture, offering his signature insight on the biggest storylines across the league as the race for the Cup officially begins.

videos.title: How to Make Pullups MUCH Easier
videos.summary_source_text:
How to Make Pullups MUCH Easier If you think a handful of pull-ups makes you strong… it might be time to rethink your standards.

In this video, I’m breaking down why pull-ups are one of the most brutally honest tests of upper body strength—and why so many people struggle with them despite training consistently. The issue isn’t effort. It’s what you’re training—and what you’re leaving out.

Most people overemphasize pressing movements like bench press and shoulder work while neglecting the muscles that actually drive pulling strength. Without strong scapular control, a developed upper back, and proper arm involvement beyond just biceps and triceps, your strength won’t carry over to the bar.

That’s why pull-ups expose everything:
Weak lats
Poor scapular function
Imbalances from years of bad posture
Gaps in real pulling strength

On top of that, pull-ups are a direct reflection of your strength-to-weight ratio. The more non-contributing mass you carry, the harder every rep becomes. But being under-muscled creates the same issue—you simply don’t have the force production to move your body efficiently.

This is what makes pull-ups such a powerful benchmark:
They don’t reward shortcuts
They don’t hide weaknesses
They don’t lie about your strength

Whether you’re trying to get your first rep or increase your total, improving your pull-ups requires building real, transferable strength through proper training—not just doing more reps.

If you want to improve your upper body strength, fix muscle imbalances, and start performing pull-ups the right way, you need a plan that addresses the entire chain involved in the movement.

For more tips on building muscle, correcting posture, stretching, and chronic aches and pains, be sure to stay tuned to this channel and remember to subscribe so you never miss another video from a physical therapist with a pro sports background as a PT and strength coach.

You can subscribe to this channel here - http://bit.ly/2b0coMW

Jeff earned his Masters of Physical Therapy and Bachelor’s of Physioneurobiology from the College of Health Sciences University of Connecticut Storrs. He is a certified Strength and Conditioning Specialist by the National Strength and Conditioning Association (NSCA). videos.title: IF Only You Knew This Swing Key Years Ago #shorts #golf #golfer #golfswing #ericcogorno
videos.summary_source_text:
IF Only You Knew This Swing Key Years Ago #shorts #golf #golfer #golfswing #ericcogorno #shorts 

Hips in the golf swing = the #1 key to solid ball striking. In this golf lesson, Eric Cogorno explains how to get your hips forward in the downswing.

🏌️ WORK WITH ERIC COGORNO IN PERSON! Two-Day Golf Schools in Florida and Pennsylvania - Limited Spots Available! 
👉 Register Here: https://bit.ly/48bbScn 

📱 GET THE SWING COACH APP The BEST Golf Swing Training App Ever Created 
👉 Download Here: https://inf.getswingcoach.com/EC1 

🎯 PERSONALIZED ONLINE COACHING Get Custom Golf Instruction from Eric Cogorno 
👉 Learn More: https://www.cogornogolf.com 

📚 STEP-BY-STEP TRAINING PROGRAMS Eric's Complete Golf Improvement System 
👉 Start Here: https://ericcogornogolf.podia.com 

🛒 RECOMMENDED GOLF EQUIPMENT & TRAINING AIDS:
• Takomo Golf - https://takomogolf.com
• Precision Impact Right Wrist Trainer - https://pureswingproducts.com/?sca_ref=1815522.bXQUsGp2bS (Code: COGORNO for $20 OFF)
• theHanger Training Aid - https://www.hangergolf.com/?sca_ref=944104.HqM9GYcX2I (Code: COGORNO for 15% OFF)

In This Video, You'll Discover:
• The hip movement in the golf swing that every consistent ball striker shares — and the two specific reasons it controls both contact and direction 
• How to fix fat and thin shots for good by understanding how hip position in the downswing  directly controls where the club bottoms out 
• How to eliminate over-the-top pulls and fades with the lead knee "break the wall" drill — one of Eric Cogorno's go-to golf drills for getting the lower body forward immediately 
• How to unlock the trail side "through the ball" feel that completes hip rotation without losing club face control — essential golf swing tips for any high handicap golfer 
• How to stop hanging back with a two-part mantra ("lead side down and forward, trail side through") that simplifies the entire golf swing sequence 
• How to use golf swing analysis in real time with the Swing Coach AI app to instantly see whether your hips are forward or back on every single swing 
• Exactly how PGA Tour players like Scottie Scheffler, Colin Morikawa, and Tommy Fleetwood drive their hips 4–6 inches forward while keeping their head back — and how you can replicate that in your own game

Eric Cogorno breaks down one of the most misunderstood fundamentals in this golf lesson: getting the hips well forward to start the downswing is non-negotiable for solid, consistent ball striking. Whether you're just learning how to play golf or trying to break 90, this hip movement is the fastest path to hitting ball-first contact. The SwingCoach app, featured throughout this video, color-codes your hip position after every swing and includes in-app instruction from Eric to help you fix it on the spot. For more on lower body sequencing and golf swing tips, check out the next recommended video.

#HipsInGolfSwing #Downswing #GolfLesson #HighHandicapGolfer #GolfSwingTips #GolfSwingCoach #GolfSwing #GolfDrills #GolfSwingAnalysis #HowToPlayGolf #EricCogorno #PGATour #Golf 

__________________________________________________

Your purchase helps support my work in bringing you free content to help you learn about golf and improve your game. My goal is to help people through my experience so I will not recommend a product or service unless I've

1. Used it personally. (which will be the case the vast majority of the time)
2. Thoroughly researched it and got first-hand user feedback from other professionals I trust and that have used the product/service #shorts

I also guide a short somatic exploration to help you sense your body in a different way.

videos.title: Bernd Maylander: 500 Races In The Safety Car | F1 Beyond The Grid
videos.summary_source_text:
Bernd Maylander: 500 Races In The Safety Car | F1 Beyond The Grid At this year’s season-opening Australian Grand Prix, Bernd Maylander reached a remarkable milestone of 500 races as the FIA Safety Car Driver.

Speaking to Tom Clarkson, Bernd reflects on how the Safety Car and his job have evolved since his first race back in 2000 and some of the most iconic races he’s been involved in over the last 25 years.

He talks through what a Grand Prix weekend looks like for him, the role his co-driver Richard Darker plays and some of the challenges they face – like picking up the leader when the Safety Car is deployed and judging wet conditions.

Bernd also reveals what it feels like to have the fastest drivers on the planet right behind him and how he handles them complaining about his speed.

The Gallstone Mistake That Leads to SURGERY (700,000 a Year) What causes gallstones, and can you get rid of gallstones without surgery? Uncover the real cause of gallstones and gallbladder problems so you can address the issue at the root. 

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

0:00 Introduction: What causes gallstones?
1:02 Gallbladder function
2:41 Gallstone causes  
3:37 Bile salts deficiency
4:25 The real cause of gallstones 
5:31 How to dissolve gallstones and bile sludge 
7:21 Estrogen and gallstones
8:39 Nutrients to support gallbladder health
10:11 Hypothyroidism and gallstones 
10:26 Gallbladder pain relief 

Keep watching for more ways to keep your gallbladder and liver healthy: 
▶️ https://youtu.be/WN7Rpa3uVAQ
▶️ https://youtu.be/TYvz4hyYqhI
▶️ https://youtu.be/4Wd5a4veej8

Download Dr. Berg's Free Daily Health Routine: https://drbrg.co/4cJ3wdF

Every year, 700,000 people have their gallbladder removed. Many people still deal with the same symptoms or worse after surgery.

The gallbladder stores and concentrates bile, releasing it when needed. Bile is essential for breaking down fats and absorbing fat-soluble vitamins.

Gallstones form when there’s too much cholesterol and not enough bile salts. Bile sludge typically develops first, eventually leading to gallstones. The real cause of gallstones is not producing enough bile to handle cholesterol.

When the gallbladder is removed, you lose the ability to store and concentrate bile. Some people even experience too much bile flow afterward, which can lead to diarrhea.

Dietary fat does not cause gallstones! Low-fat diets are the single greatest triggers of gallstones. Fat actually stimulates bile production.

The real problem is sugar and hidden sugars. High-carb diets increase cholesterol while reducing bile production, raising the risk of gallstones. This is why prediabetics and diabetics are more likely to develop gallstones.

Bile salts can help thin bile sludge and may even support the breakdown of gallstones. TUDCA is especially effective for thinning bile in the ducts, particularly in cases linked to right shoulder pain. Taking bile salts right after eating can also support fat digestion and bile flow.

Dr. Eric Berg DC Bio:
Dr. Berg, age 60, is a chiropractor who specializes in Healthy Ketosis & Intermittent Fasting. He is the Director of Dr. Berg Nutritionals and author of the best-selling book The Healthy Keto Plan. He no longer practices, but focuses on health education through social media.

videos.title: Rockies Ownership Shakeup, Rory Wins The Masters & NFL Media Scandal | After the Horn Ep. 45
videos.summary_source_text:
Rockies Ownership Shakeup, Rory Wins The Masters & NFL Media Scandal | After the Horn Ep. 45 The biggest Colorado sports story in years may be happening off the field. On this episode of After the Horn, Tom Green, Ron Zappolo, and Woody Paige (in spirit) break down the reported sale of 40% of the Colorado Rockies to the Penner Group and what it could mean for the future of baseball in Denver. Could this be the beginning of a full ownership transition? 

Plus, the guys dive into Rory McIlroy’s dramatic Masters victory, the state of golf’s biggest stars, and whether Cam Young has officially arrived as a major contender. Then they turn to the Colorado Avalanche and Denver Nuggets as playoff season heats up, with bold predictions for both championship contenders. 

They also tackle the NFL’s biggest off-field controversy involving Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini, media ethics, and why stories like this create bigger conversations across sports journalism. 

If you love smart, spirited, no-BS sports talk that starts when the buzzer sounds — this is the show for you.

25:30 Nuggets vs Timberwolves Preview

videos.title: What If It’s Not Actually Hunger?
videos.summary_source_text:
What If It’s Not Actually Hunger? Eating can become a conditioned response, tied more to routine than real hunger. When that pattern is recognized, it becomes easier to step back instead of reacting automatically. Shifting attention, even briefly, breaks the cycle and creates space for a different choice. Over time, this builds awareness and restores a more natural relationship with food.

To learn more about how to book a consultation with me please check out https://aristotleeducation.com

All of my social media and official links: https://linktr.ee/pradipjamnadasmd

As a consultant cardiologist with a large diversified inpatient and outpatient practice he is noted for his passions for teaching and illuminating prevention for cardiovascular disease . He is also a clinical assistant professor of medicine at The Florida State University and University of Central Florida. Rick Shiels what's in the bag 2026 🤔 Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

videos.title: THAT'S A WRAP! The Carolina Hurricanes Close Out the Regular season 53-22-7 After 2-1 Win
videos.summary_source_text:
THAT'S A WRAP! The Carolina Hurricanes Close Out the Regular season 53-22-7 After 2-1 Win The Carolina Hurricanes finish the regular season with a 2-1 win over the New York Islanders. What stood out in the game that saw debuts, a Brandon Bussi win, and Nikolaj Ehlers staying red hot, along with Mark Jankowski? On the Wednesday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on the Hurricanes finishing the season 53-22-7 and on a five-game point streak. The Hurricanes went 3-0-1 on the last road trip of the season to tally 113 total points, while having a ton of Chicago Wolves in the lineup. Secondly, Zach reacts to what one of the debutants, Ronan Seeley, says, along with Mark Jankowski. How did the guys feel after the Canes' win to finish the season on a high note? Finally, Zach concludes the show by reacting to what Rod Brind'Amour said postgame. How did the head coach feel about his team finishing off the season with a win? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

Build a Lightweight “OpenClaw” AI Agent from Scratch (Tools, Skills, Memory & Commands)

The script walks through a new GitHub tutorial for building a lightweight, customizable version of OpenClaw and testing it inside Claude Code. It covers cloning the repo, setting up Python and an OpenRouter API key, creating a config file, and running an initial chat loop. Next, it adds tool-calling so the agent can read, write, edit files, and run shell commands, then introduces skills loaded from markdown files (including creating a “pirate speak” skill). It demonstrates persistence by saving conversations to a memory file, then adds slash commands (help, sessions, resume, skills) to manage sessions and recall prior chats, plus mentions compaction for compressing context. The creator notes there are 18 steps across four phases, and promotes the AI Profit Boardroom community and training.

videos.title: The BIG Zinc Mistake
videos.summary_source_text:
The BIG Zinc Mistake Taking too much zinc or too little can lead to unwanted side effects. Discover 4 common zinc mistakes people make that can interfere with its effectiveness. Avoid zinc dosage mistakes when taking supplements to maximize the amazing health benefits of zinc! 

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

0:00 Introduction: 4 common zinc mistakes people make when taking supplements
0:20 Taking too much zinc  
1:49 Not taking cofactors with zinc supplements 
3:20 Not knowing when to take zinc 
3:55 Foods high in zinc and trace minerals
4:19 Taking not enough zinc 
6:10 Zinc sources and zinc supplements 

Learn to spot the first signs of a nutrient deficiency with this FREE guide: https://drbrg.co/41vxVG7

Boost your health IQ with these essential definitions for healthy living: https://drbrg.co/3Qqnwcl

Learn more about the function of magnesium here: https://drbrg.co/4vwAt4v

Did you know that without enough zinc, you will die? Over 200 to 300 different enzymes in your body require zinc!

Avoid these 4 big zinc supplement mistakes!

1. Taking too much zinc
Zinc and copper work together and compete for absorption. Always take copper with zinc to avoid a copper deficiency. 

Some parts of the immune system benefit from high doses of zinc, while others thrive with just the right amount of zinc. Taking 100 to 200 mg of zinc for 3 days is beneficial if you have an inflammatory infection, but high doses of zinc for extended periods can also be damaging. Know when to take zinc and avoid high doses for long periods. 

2. No cofactors taken with zinc
Cofactors are vitamins and minerals that work together to allow our biochemistry to work. For zinc to function properly in the body, you need adequate magnesium, vitamin B6, and folate. 

3. Not knowing when you’re deficient
White nail spots can sometimes indicate a zinc deficiency, but how can you know for sure if you’re deficient? Try the zinc test! Take a small amount of zinc in your mouth and swish it around. If you can taste the metallic taste, you are not deficient. If you can’t taste anything, you need more zinc. 

4. Taking too little zinc 
Taking too little zinc is just as bad as taking too much! Carbohydrates contain phytic acid, which blocks zinc. This is why zinc deficiency is so common in children. Diarrhea can deplete zinc and other minerals, and low stomach acid can inhibit mineral absorption. Alcohol, pregnancy, and high estrogen from birth control pills can also increase your demand for zinc. 

Red meat, shellfish, liver, and oysters are the best sources of zinc. If you opt for supplements, you must take at least 30 mg of zinc daily for a therapeutic effect. Zinc works best when taken with food, but it still works on an empty stomach. 

👉 Get Dr.Berg’s Daily Routine as a free download: https://drbrg.co/41DbgHV

Dr. Berg, age 60, is a chiropractor who specializes in Healthy Ketosis & Intermittent Fasting. He is the Director of Dr. Berg Nutritionals and author of the best-selling book The Healthy Keto Plan. He no longer practices, but focuses on health education through social media.

Multica: Orchestrate a Team of Autonomous AI Agents in One Dashboard (Free & Open Source)

The episode tests Multica, a free open-source platform for managing multiple AI agents as a coordinated team in one workspace, with features like agents as teammates, autonomous task lifecycle management, reusable skills, unified runtimes, and multi-workspace organization. It walks through installing Multica, creating a workspace, setting up a master “CEO” agent (Hermes) and additional agents (a marketing agent on Claude Code and an OpenClaw agent), then assigning projects and issues on a Kanban board with inbox-style updates, priorities, and status tracking. The script highlights runtime monitoring (inputs/outputs, token use, connection tests), workspace settings (members, repositories, APIs, modes), and notes routines integration is coming. It compares Multica to Paperclip, saying Multica is built more for teams, while Paperclip is more solo-focused, and mentions occasional agent connectivity bugs.

videos.title: UK | 14th April, Tuesday - RIFT Auto-Trading Launch
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 14th April, Tuesday - RIFT Auto-Trading Launch 14/04/26
3FO – The Next-Generation Financial Ecosystem Powered by AI and DeFi

3FO is an innovative digital platform designed to redefine how individuals interact with modern finance. Built at the intersection of artificial intelligence, decentralized finance (DeFi), and blockchain transparency, 3FO provides users with powerful tools to participate in the evolving digital economy and explore new opportunities for wealth creation.

At the core of the 3FO ecosystem is its vision of financial empowerment through accessible technology. The platform combines advanced AI-driven strategies with decentralized infrastructure, enabling users to participate in automated yield systems without needing deep technical knowledge of trading or DeFi protocols.

One of the standout elements of 3FO is the Alpha AI Yield engine, an intelligent system designed to optimize digital asset strategies and manage yield generation across multiple decentralized protocols. By leveraging adaptive algorithms and diversified deployment strategies, Alpha AI continuously analyzes market conditions and allocates capital in ways intended to maximize efficiency and performance.

3FO also introduces an integrated financial framework that brings together several powerful components within one ecosystem. These include LQUIDPAY, a self-custodial DeFi banking environment that enables global transactions, crypto spending, and on-chain yield opportunities, and Protocol Yield, a performance-focused platform designed to provide transparent, traceable returns powered by decentralized financial strategies.

Another key feature of the platform is its emphasis on transparency and user control. Because the system operates on blockchain infrastructure, users can view earnings and transactions in real time, providing visibility into how digital assets move and generate yield across the network.

3FO is also built with scalability and collaboration in mind. Through its network-driven model, participants can expand their engagement within the ecosystem while benefiting from a structure designed to encourage shared growth and collective success.

With a focus on AI automation, decentralized finance innovation, and user-controlled digital banking, 3FO aims to create a comprehensive financial environment where technology works continuously to support smarter asset management and new economic opportunities.

As the global financial landscape evolves toward blockchain-based systems, 3FO positions itself as a forward-thinking platform that merges cutting-edge technology with accessible financial tools—empowering individuals to participate in the future of programmable money and decentralized wealth creation. 14/04/26

videos.summary_source_text:
Radek Bonk's son, Oliver, has impressive debut! 🇨🇿🌟 Oliver Bonk helps the Philadelphia Flyers in a 4-2 win over Montreal with a goal and an assist. He becomes only the 10th defenseman in NHL history to record multiple points in his first NHL period and is just the 3rd defenseman in Flyers' history with multiple points in his debut. His stellar debut earns him the second star of the game

videos.title: 14.4: Wallstedt joins Wild record books with 35-save performance! 🇸🇪⭐
videos.summary_source_text:
14.4: Wallstedt joins Wild record books with 35-save performance! 🇸🇪⭐ Jesper Wallstedt lives up to his name in this Western Conference matchup against the Ducks, stopping 35 of 37 shots he faces to lead Minnesota to a 3-2 victory! With the victory, Wallstedt joins Kaapo Kahkonen as the 2nd rookie goalie in Wild history to register 20 wins. Wallstedt also joins Kahkonen as the 2nd rookie goalie in Wild history with at least ten 30-plus-save victories. Wallstedt's impressive game earns him both 1st star of the game and Top European Player of the Night honors!

videos.title: 🇨🇿 PASTA Hits 100! 🍝
videos.summary_source_text:
🇨🇿 PASTA Hits 100! 🍝 David Pastrnak records his 100th point of the season with a slick assist from below the goal line, setting up Morgan Geekie just 53 seconds into the game! The Czech star reaches 100 points for the fourth consecutive season, tying Nikita Kucherov and Leon Draisaitl for the third-longest such streak by a player born outside North America. videos.title: 🇸🇪 Dueling Swedish debuts: Felix Unger Sörum, Victor Eklund each tally their 1st NHL point! 🥳
videos.summary_source_text:
🇸🇪 Dueling Swedish debuts: Felix Unger Sörum, Victor Eklund each tally their 1st NHL point! 🥳 What a night for Swedish rookies! Carolina's Felix Unger Sörum and New York's Victor Eklund each makes their NHL debut on opposite sides of the ice, and each notches their 1st career point in the process! Unger Sörum first sets up Nikolaj Ehlers for the game's opening goal, and then Eklund starts a gorgeous play that results in Bo Horvat's 300th NHL goal.

videos.title: Kings & Flyers Will Play For Stanley: The NHL’s Playoff Picture is Finalized | Daily Faceoff Live
videos.summary_source_text:
Kings & Flyers Will Play For Stanley: The NHL’s Playoff Picture is Finalized | Daily Faceoff Live Welcome to Daily Faceoff Live!

The NHL playoff picture is officially set — and the Los Angeles Kings and Philadelphia Flyers are heading to the Stanley Cup Playoffs.

We break down the Kings clinching their fifth straight playoff berth and what it means for the Western Conference, plus the fallout from the Nashville Predators missing the postseason. Could we be headed for another Oilers vs Kings showdown?

In the East, the Flyers have officially punched their ticket and locked in a first-round matchup with the Pittsburgh Penguins. We share early thoughts on the series and what could decide the outcome.

Plus, the Buffalo Sabres clinch the Atlantic Division for the first time since the 2009-10 season. What’s the key to them winning their first-round matchup against either the Ottawa Senators or Boston Bruins?

David Pagnotta joins with the latest Insider Notebook, including potential changes in Nashville, Morgan Reilly’s recent comments, the latest on Alex Ovechkin, and what could be next for Detroit if Steve Yzerman stays in charge.

videos.title: Hindi | 14th April, Tuesday - RIFT Auto-Trading Launch
videos.summary_source_text:
Hindi | 14th April, Tuesday - RIFT Auto-Trading Launch 14/04/26
3FO – The Next-Generation Financial Ecosystem Powered by AI and DeFi

3FO is an innovative digital platform designed to redefine how individuals interact with modern finance. Built at the intersection of artificial intelligence, decentralized finance (DeFi), and blockchain transparency, 3FO provides users with powerful tools to participate in the evolving digital economy and explore new opportunities for wealth creation.

At the core of the 3FO ecosystem is its vision of financial empowerment through accessible technology. The platform combines advanced AI-driven strategies with decentralized infrastructure, enabling users to participate in automated yield systems without needing deep technical knowledge of trading or DeFi protocols.

One of the standout elements of 3FO is the Alpha AI Yield engine, an intelligent system designed to optimize digital asset strategies and manage yield generation across multiple decentralized protocols. By leveraging adaptive algorithms and diversified deployment strategies, Alpha AI continuously analyzes market conditions and allocates capital in ways intended to maximize efficiency and performance.

3FO also introduces an integrated financial framework that brings together several powerful components within one ecosystem. These include LQUIDPAY, a self-custodial DeFi banking environment that enables global transactions, crypto spending, and on-chain yield opportunities, and Protocol Yield, a performance-focused platform designed to provide transparent, traceable returns powered by decentralized financial strategies.

Another key feature of the platform is its emphasis on transparency and user control. Because the system operates on blockchain infrastructure, users can view earnings and transactions in real time, providing visibility into how digital assets move and generate yield across the network.

3FO is also built with scalability and collaboration in mind. Through its network-driven model, participants can expand their engagement within the ecosystem while benefiting from a structure designed to encourage shared growth and collective success.

With a focus on AI automation, decentralized finance innovation, and user-controlled digital banking, 3FO aims to create a comprehensive financial environment where technology works continuously to support smarter asset management and new economic opportunities.

As the global financial landscape evolves toward blockchain-based systems, 3FO positions itself as a forward-thinking platform that merges cutting-edge technology with accessible financial tools—empowering individuals to participate in the future of programmable money and decentralized wealth creation. 14/04/26

videos.title: Justin Thomas wins in DRAMATIC playoff | 2025 RBC Heritage FULL Final Round Broadcast
videos.summary_source_text:
Justin Thomas wins in DRAMATIC playoff | 2025 RBC Heritage FULL Final Round Broadcast Relive the entire Final Round broadcast from last year's RBC Heritage tournament, where Justin Thomas sunk a 21-foot birdie putt to defeat Andrew Novak in a playoff. 

Thomas had come into the last round trailing Si Woo Kim, but after shooting a 3-under 68, he joined Andrew Novak in a playoff. Novak missed his putt on the first playoff hole, leaving Thomas to roll in the winning birdie. 

The victory made Thomas a 16-time PGA TOUR winner and marked his first title in over two years. This week, he'll be looking to defend at Harbour Town Golf Links in Hilton Head Island, South Carolina.

videos.title: Most Common Shooting Release in Hockey
videos.summary_source_text:
Most Common Shooting Release in Hockey The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: Masters 2x Champ - Rory McIlroy Shares His Winning Golf Tips!
videos.summary_source_text:
Masters 2x Champ - Rory McIlroy Shares His Winning Golf Tips! Masters 2x Champ - Rory Mcilroy Shares His Winning Golf Tips!


With the opening of The Trott Shop imminent this #tourtrucktuesday feels like the perfect time to check in with recent 2 Time Masters Champion & NOW 6 TIME MAJOR CHAMPION - Mr Rory McIlroy.

Today’s upload summarizes the best bits from Rory’s STUDS or DUDS episode filmed at the TaylorMade Photoshoot. Rory guides us through his fitting non-negotiable points and what he demands from his golf clubs.

He reflects on his internal conversations about the iconic shot he hit on hole 15 in 2025 and do or die moments at Augusta National as players close out a Masters Victory.

I love how he talks about his comfort levels with golf clubs and what he likes to feel to gain confidence when in high pressure situations. He touches on the overlap between coaching and fitting and when is the best time for a player to consider an equipment change.

I am so happy for Rory McIlroy and all his success. Well deserved and truly an honor to spend time with him in this environment.

As always #comment with any questions and be sure to hit #subscibe for more equipment vids.
