videos.title: Is This Year’s Dallas Stars Roster Better Or Worse Than The 3 WCF Teams? | DLLS Stars Podcast
videos.summary_source_text:
Is This Year’s Dallas Stars Roster Better Or Worse Than The 3 WCF Teams? | DLLS Stars Podcast Check out Fran Duffy’s 2026 Diehard Draft Guide! https://alldlls.com/draftguide26/

We are down to just one regular season game left for the Dallas Stars (tomorrow night at Buffalo) and then playoffs get underway. On today’s DLLS Stars Podcast, we begin by discussing Mavrik Bourque’s first career NHL hat trick last night against the Toronto Maple Leafs. We will be joined by Minnesota Wild radio play-by-play broadcaster Joe O’Donnell as we get ready for a highly anticipated first round playoff series between the Stars and Wild. Then we will take a look at the Stars’ lineups for each of the last three post seasons, where they reached the Western Conference Final in 2023, 2024 and 2025, and we will compare those groups to the current Stars roster - how does this year’s team stack up?

videos.title: Lazy stride? Try this 🏒
videos.summary_source_text:
Lazy stride? Try this 🏒 There’s a side of speed that most players completely overlook: how fast your nervous system fires (or how fast the brain can send a signal to the muscles and how fast those muscles can respond).

Every stride requires your muscles to turn on and off in a rapid sequence. The faster your nervous system can run that sequence, the quicker your feet move. The slower it runs, the heavier you look on the ice.

Quick-feet drills teach your nervous system to cycle through that on/off pattern faster. The more you do them, the more natural that faster rhythm becomes. Waking Up at 3 AM? Do This to Fall Back Asleep FAST Waking up in the middle of the night is incredibly common. Many people suddenly wake up at 2 a.m., 3 a.m., or 4 a.m. and struggle to fall back asleep.

This often happens because the body shifts into a stress response, activating fight-or-flight mode. This can happen after a stressful dream, when your mind starts racing, or when you start problem-solving in the middle of the night.

Instead, there’s a simple technique that may help calm your nervous system and make it easier to drift back to sleep.

videos.summary_source_text:
Take 1/4 Teaspoon Tonight — Wake Up Flatter by Morning If you wake up feeling bloated, sluggish, or not fully emptied out, your gut may not be functioning the way it should. In this video, you’ll discover how just a small amount of turmeric, about 1/4 teaspoon, can support your digestive system, reduce internal irritation, and help promote smoother, more regular bowel movements. Turmeric’s active compound, curcumin, has powerful antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties that support the gut lining, improve the balance of beneficial bacteria, and stimulate bile flow for better fat digestion and waste elimination. When your digestive system slows down, toxins and waste can build up, leading to bloating, discomfort, fatigue, and even skin issues. By supporting your gut and liver naturally, you help your body do what it’s designed to do, eliminate waste efficiently and restore balance from the inside out. Use turmeric consistently, combine it with black pepper for better absorption, and take it with healthy fats to maximize its benefits. Take action tonight and start giving your body the support it needs to feel lighter, cleaner, and more energized by morning.

From the 1 million token context window to adaptive thinking and effort controls, this video explores the features that transform Claude from a simple chatbot into a full-fledged AI productivity system. We also cover memory, chat search, projects, web search, research mode, artifacts, pricing strategies, benchmarks, and enterprise-grade privacy and safety.

GPT-5.5 might not be officially released yet, but the internal codename “Spud” hints at OpenAI’s next major AI breakthrough. Here’s everything you need to know.

Is GPT-5.5 actually real, or is it just another AI rumor? In this video, we separate fact from speculation and explore what credible reporting reveals about OpenAI’s mysterious internal codename “Spud.”

While GPT-5.4 remains the latest publicly documented flagship model, multiple trusted sources suggest that OpenAI is preparing the next evolution in the GPT-5.x series. This video provides a no-hype, research-backed breakdown of what’s confirmed, what’s inferred, and how developers and businesses can prepare for the future.

videos.title: Get More Speed | Part 1 | Padraig Harrington
videos.summary_source_text:
Get More Speed | Part 1 | Padraig Harrington As part of my YouTube series  “Ten lessons every golfer should know”, the third Paddy’s Golf Tip covers “Speed”, which is a two-part video. 
 
In this first instalment, I explain why "intention" is the key to increasing swingspeed and why you need to hit the ball harder in practise to raise your personal ceiling, before taking it onto the course.  I demonstrate various techniques to help achieve this and how to experiment to find out what works for you.

#padraigharrington #golfing #golftips #paddysgolftips #golf #feedback #speed

Born in Dublin, Padraig is a proud family man married to Caroline with two children, Patrick and Ciaran. videos.title: Tournament Golf Is Terrifying (Shocking Result)
videos.summary_source_text:
Tournament Golf Is Terrifying (Shocking Result) In this video, I put my game to the test on the iconic La Manga Club South Course — a championship layout that has hosted the Legends Tour (European Senior Masters). The goal? To see how my golf stacks up against Senior Tour professionals and whether I can realistically compete at that level.

After working on my swing speed, golf fitness, and overall performance, this is the ultimate benchmark. Playing under tournament-style conditions, I take on one of Spain’s most famous golf courses to find out if an amateur golfer can shoot level par on a tour-level course.

This is a real look at my golf journey, where my game is right now, and what it actually takes to compete with elite players. No myths, no excuses — just honest golf, real scores, and the truth about improving your game.

videos.title: BEAST OF THE EAST! Carolina Hurricanes Clinch the Eastern Conference 1st Seed!
videos.summary_source_text:
BEAST OF THE EAST! Carolina Hurricanes Clinch the Eastern Conference 1st Seed! The Carolina Hurricanes made history again on Monday night after securing the first seed in the Eastern Conference for the first time in franchise history. Not only that, they will have home-ice advantage through the Eastern Conference Final. What does it mean for the team with one game left in the regular season? On the Tuesday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on the Hurricanes claiming the top seed in the Eastern Conference for the first time in franchise history. As they did to clinch the Metropolitan Division, they forced the game into overtime to secure the point needed. What does it mean now for the Hurricanes as they have home-ice advantage through the Eastern side of the playoffs? Secondly, Zach reacts to what Jordan Martinook said after the game. How did he feel after the game, despite the loss, knowing they secured the first seed in the East? What is the mindset for the team with one game left in the regular season? Finally, Zach concludes the show by sharing his thoughts on how the Hurricanes should handle their final regular-season game before the playoffs. With Pyotr Kochetkov called up on Monday, will he start on Tuesday? Also, how does Zach feel about either the Boston Bruins or the Ottawa Senators being the Hurricanes' first-round opponent? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

When sparkling water enters your esophagus and stomach, it stimulates mechanoreceptors, special nerve endings that activate the vagus nerve, one of the most important nerves for calming your body.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators

• Some of the world’s best golf courses

• Bryson DeChambeau

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

• Amazing golf courses

videos.title: I Expose the TRUTH about Chinese Off-Roaders!
videos.summary_source_text:
I Expose the TRUTH about Chinese Off-Roaders! Huge thanks to Davanti for supplying the Terratoura All-Terrain tyres for this video: https://davanti-tyres.com/

Explore new and used car deals with Carwow: https://bit.ly/Change-Your-Car-14-04

Can a 7-seat Chinese SUV really go toe-to-toe against one of the toughest off-roaders there is? Well, we’re about to find out as we take a Chery Tiggo 9 to an off-road course and run it in a series of challenges against a Land Rover Discovery! 

On the face of it, you may think the Discovery would walk this, but is there more to the Chery than meets the eye? Let’s take a closer look at the stats… 

Starting with the Land Rover, it’s powered by a 3-litre V6 diesel that can produce 306hp and 700Nm. This power is sent to all four wheels, and it weighs in at 2,230kg. It also comes with several features to help it tackle this off-road course, including a central locking diff, air suspension, and a terrain response system which uses electronics to maximise traction. 

As for the Chery, it’s equipped with a 1.5-litre turbo petrol engine as well as three electric motors, and these combine to produce 430hp and 580Nm - more than the Discovery! It also has All Wheel Drive, and the weight is almost similar, tipping the scales at 2,233kg. However, apart from off-road mode, it has no clever terrain driving features as found in the Disco. 

It’s also worth noting that to keep things fair, we’ve fitted both cars with Davanti Terratoura all-terrain tyres! 

So surely it will be a walkover for the Land Rover, right? There’s only one way to find out for sure… It’s time to go OFF-ROADING!

Thanks to https://www.instagram.com/davanti_tyres/ for helping us with this video! Huge thanks to Davanti for supplying the Terratoura All-Terrain tyres for this video: https://davanti-tyres.com/

videos.title: The #1 Deficiency Behind Aging Spots
videos.summary_source_text:
The #1 Deficiency Behind Aging Spots Find out if a mineral deficiency is the cause of your aging spots! 

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

0:00 Introduction: What causes aging spots?
1:40 Conventional age spot removal
3:11 What triggers melanin production?
4:44 Aging spots remedies 

In this video, we’re going to talk about the causes and remedies of aging spots. Aging spots are sometimes called liver spots, but they’re not necessarily caused by the liver. Around 90% of people over 60 have these age spots.

Age spots are composed of melanin, the pigment that gives hair, skin, and eyes their color. Melanin protects against UV radiation, but we also need this radiation for vitamin D.

UV damage causes oxidative stress, or stress that occurs at the cellular level. Antioxidants can help neutralize this damage. 

Oxidative stress triggers melanin and increases hyperpigmentation. Increased estrogen and progesterone during pregnancy, diabetes, inflammation, certain drugs, and stress can also increase melanin production. 

Melanin absorbs UV rays and neutralizes the damage by dispersing it through the body and turning it into heat. 

I reviewed some of the patents for age spot remedies, and they included natural remedies such as vitamin C, grape seed extract, zinc, licorice extract, and berries.

Many natural remedies for age spots include zinc and selenium. Zinc is good for everything related to your skin. It’s involved in hundreds of enzyme reactions and biochemical pathways and is considered a very powerful antioxidant. Zinc can naturally lower excess melanin production. 

Zinc combined with selenium can be very effective against age spots. Selenium is a precursor to glutathione, one of the most powerful antioxidants. Selenium and zinc also protect your DNA. You can use a cream with zinc and selenium or take them as a supplement combined with other trace minerals. 

Dr. Eric Berg DC Bio:
Dr. Berg, age 61, is a chiropractor who specializes in Healthy Ketosis & Intermittent Fasting. He is the author of the best-selling book The Healthy Keto Plan, and is the Director of Dr. Berg Nutritionals. He no longer practices, but focuses on health education through social media.

videos.title: UK | 13th April, Monday - RIFT Auto-Trading Launch
videos.summary_source_text:
UK | 13th April, Monday - RIFT Auto-Trading Launch 13/04/26
3FO – The Next-Generation Financial Ecosystem Powered by AI and DeFi

3FO is an innovative digital platform designed to redefine how individuals interact with modern finance. Built at the intersection of artificial intelligence, decentralized finance (DeFi), and blockchain transparency, 3FO provides users with powerful tools to participate in the evolving digital economy and explore new opportunities for wealth creation.

At the core of the 3FO ecosystem is its vision of financial empowerment through accessible technology. The platform combines advanced AI-driven strategies with decentralized infrastructure, enabling users to participate in automated yield systems without needing deep technical knowledge of trading or DeFi protocols.

One of the standout elements of 3FO is the Alpha AI Yield engine, an intelligent system designed to optimize digital asset strategies and manage yield generation across multiple decentralized protocols. By leveraging adaptive algorithms and diversified deployment strategies, Alpha AI continuously analyzes market conditions and allocates capital in ways intended to maximize efficiency and performance.

3FO also introduces an integrated financial framework that brings together several powerful components within one ecosystem. These include LQUIDPAY, a self-custodial DeFi banking environment that enables global transactions, crypto spending, and on-chain yield opportunities, and Protocol Yield, a performance-focused platform designed to provide transparent, traceable returns powered by decentralized financial strategies.

Another key feature of the platform is its emphasis on transparency and user control. Because the system operates on blockchain infrastructure, users can view earnings and transactions in real time, providing visibility into how digital assets move and generate yield across the network.

3FO is also built with scalability and collaboration in mind. Through its network-driven model, participants can expand their engagement within the ecosystem while benefiting from a structure designed to encourage shared growth and collective success.

With a focus on AI automation, decentralized finance innovation, and user-controlled digital banking, 3FO aims to create a comprehensive financial environment where technology works continuously to support smarter asset management and new economic opportunities.

As the global financial landscape evolves toward blockchain-based systems, 3FO positions itself as a forward-thinking platform that merges cutting-edge technology with accessible financial tools—empowering individuals to participate in the future of programmable money and decentralized wealth creation. 13/04/26

videos.title: St. Louis Swedish rookies lead the charge with two SWEET goals! 🇸🇪🚨🇸🇪🚨
videos.summary_source_text:
St. Louis Swedish rookies lead the charge with two SWEET goals! 🇸🇪🚨🇸🇪🚨 Blues' Swedish rookies Otto Stenberg and Theo Lindstein each score key goals to help lead St. Louis to a 6-3 victory over Minnesota! First, Stenberg puts home a big rebound to make it 3-2 Wild, then Lindstein later does some filthy dangles and beats Filip Gustavsson on the backhand to give the Blues a 4-3 lead, one they do not relinquish.

videos.title: Daniil Tarasov Comes Up Big, Florida Panthers Spoil Jonathan Quick Finale, Beat Rangers
videos.summary_source_text:
Daniil Tarasov Comes Up Big, Florida Panthers Spoil Jonathan Quick Finale, Beat Rangers Florida Panthers goalie Daniil Tarasov meets the media after his team beat Jonathan Quick and the visiting New York Rangers 3-2 on Monday, April 13, 2026. 

The Panthers, who have won two straight, got a second goal from Cole Reinhardt with 1:50 left. 

Quick is retiring after 19 NHL seasons. 

Florida also got a first-period goal from Mackie Samoskevich. 

Daniil Tarasov made 26 saves including all 13 in the third period for his second straight win. 

Florida ends its season on Wednesday against the Detroit Red Wings on Wednesday night. 

Video Courtesy Florida Panthers / @FlaPanthers / Panthers Vision

videos.title: Rory REPEATS at The Masters, RBC Heritage preview & Davis Love III joins  | The Drop
videos.summary_source_text:
Rory REPEATS at The Masters, RBC Heritage preview & Davis Love III joins  | The Drop The Drop wraps up the Masters with all the reaction, analysis and discussion on Rory McIlroy’s second consecutive green jacket win. What it means for the rest of his season, his Masters future and where he stacks up among the greatest golfers of his generation. The show also reacts to Scottie Scheffler’s remarkable weekend, Cameron Young rounding into a consistent threat at big events and another close call for the ageless Justin Rose. Then we turn the page to the 4th Signature Event of the season, as the PGA TOUR heads to the RBC Heritage at Harbour Town Golf Links. We’ll break down why there has been a recent run of major winners winning this event before we preview what it will take to get a plaid jacket this year. And who better to talk to than Davis Love III, as the 5-time winner of the RBC Heritage joins the show to talk about his history here and his role in the recent restoration process at Harbour Town.

00:00 Introduction
00:35 Rory McIlroy wins 2026 Masters
04:38 Scottie vs. Rory
05:30 Cam Young’s Masters performance 
06:02 Justin Rose’s Masters performance 
07:20 Preview of RBC Heritage

11:40 Aon Next 10 & Swing 5 update

14:32 Davis Love III joins
19:29 FedExCup standings update
19:47 Favorite images from The Masters

videos.title: Boston Dynamics Won The AI Robot Race With This One Move
videos.summary_source_text:
Boston Dynamics Won The AI Robot Race With This One Move Boston Dynamics just did what most people thought would take years longer. Atlas is now entering real serial production, the 2026 volume is already sold out, and the company that finally made it commercially viable was not Google, SoftBank, or Tesla. It was Hyundai. This video breaks down how Boston Dynamics got here, why Atlas costs so much more than Optimus, why that price may not matter, and what this shift means for the future of factory work and humanoid robots.

📩 Brand Deals & Partnerships: collabs@nouralabs.com
✉ General Inquiries: airevolutionofficial@gmail.com
🚀 New Channel: https://www.youtube.com/@science.revolution

🧠 What You’ll See
0:00 Intro
0:53 Atlas Goes Into Mass Production — Already Sold Out
01:35 Why Fukushima Forced the World to Build Humanoids
3:01 DARPA Robotics Challenge and the First Atlas
3:51 Marc Raibert, BigDog, and the $200M Military Failure
6:28 Why Google Couldn't Monetize Boston Dynamics
7:30 SoftBank's Expensive Mistake and the Spot Era
10:33 Hyundai's Secret Weapon — Actuators From Car Factories
12:22 Inside the New Atlas: 56 Joints and 360° Rotation
14:26 The Brains — Gemini Robotics, Orbit, and VR Training
16:26 $200K Price Tag, 24/7 Work, and the Road to 2030
20:13 How car factory solve all problems

Boston Dynamics Atlas enters serial production
SOURCE: https://bostondynamics.com/blog/boston-dynamics-unveils-new-atlas-robot-to-revolutionize-industry/

Atlas 2026 production already fully committed
SOURCE: https://www.forbes.com/sites/johnkoetsier/2026/01/06/atlas-humanoid-robots-production-fully-committed-for-2026-factory-will-build-30000-per-year/

How Hyundai is deploying Atlas in real factories
SOURCE: https://www.reuters.com/business/autos-transportation/hyundai-motor-group-plans-deploy-humanoid-robots-us-factory-2028-2026-01-05/

Atlas factory rollout and 30,000 robots per year plan
SOURCE: https://www.theverge.com/news/853973/hyundai-boston-dynamics-atlas-robot-factory-2028

How Atlas is moving from demo to real industrial work
SOURCE: https://www.eetimes.com/humanoids-hit-the-factory-floor/

🚨 Why It Matters
Atlas is one of the clearest signs yet that humanoid robots are moving out of the demo phase and into real industrial deployment. The biggest shift here is not the backflips or the viral clips. It is the business model. Boston Dynamics finally found the right owner, the right supply chain, and the right use case. That changes the conversation from whether humanoid robots are coming to how fast they scale and who wins the race.

#ai #robots #bostondynamics Boston Dynamics just did what most people thought would take years longer. Atlas is now entering real serial production, the 2026 volume is already sold out, and the company that finally made it commercially viable was not Google, SoftBank, or Tesla. It was Hyundai. This video breaks down how Boston Dynamics got here, why Atlas costs so much more than Optimus, why that price may not matter, and what this shift means for the future of factory work and humanoid robots.

Boston Dynamics Atlas enters serial production
SOURCE: https://bostondynamics.com/blog/boston-dynamics-unveils-new-atlas-robot-to-revolutionize-industry/

Atlas 2026 production already fully committed
SOURCE: https://www.forbes.com/sites/johnkoetsier/2026/01/06/atlas-humanoid-robots-production-fully-committed-for-2026-factory-will-build-30000-per-year/

How Hyundai is deploying Atlas in real factories
SOURCE: https://www.reuters.com/business/autos-transportation/hyundai-motor-group-plans-deploy-humanoid-robots-us-factory-2028-2026-01-05/

Atlas factory rollout and 30,000 robots per year plan
SOURCE: https://www.theverge.com/news/853973/hyundai-boston-dynamics-atlas-robot-factory-2028

How Atlas is moving from demo to real industrial work
SOURCE: https://www.eetimes.com/humanoids-hit-the-factory-floor/

🚨 Why It Matters
Atlas is one of the clearest signs yet that humanoid robots are moving out of the demo phase and into real industrial deployment. The biggest shift here is not the backflips or the viral clips. It is the business model. Boston Dynamics finally found the right owner, the right supply chain, and the right use case. That changes the conversation from whether humanoid robots are coming to how fast they scale and who wins the race.

#ai #robots #bostondynamics
videos.summary: Boston Dynamics Won The AI Robot Race With This One Move Boston Dynamics just did what most people thought would take years longer. Atlas is now entering real serial production, the 2026 volume is already sold out, and the company that finally made it commercially viable was not Google, SoftBank, or Tesla.

videos.title: How to Shoot Like Connor Bedard
videos.summary_source_text:
How to Shoot Like Connor Bedard The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body's own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness. 
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

Want to stop looking like an amateur on the golf course? In this video, Coach Ed Schwent breaks down 7 mistakes amateur golfers make — and shows you exactly what better players do differently. These aren’t swing tips… they’re the real habits, decisions, and mental approaches that separate pros from amateurs.

You’ll learn how factors like wind, temperature, and lie dramatically affect your distances, why swinging at 80% tempo leads to better consistency, and how having a repeatable pre-shot routine can completely transform your game. Ed also explains smarter course management — when to aim for the middle of the green, how to avoid big numbers, and why pros stick to a plan no matter what.

Finally, we cover the biggest differences in mindset and practice — from controlling emotions after bad shots to avoiding “mindless range sessions” and focusing on the shots that actually lower scores. If you want to play smarter, score lower, and look like a much better golfer immediately, these 7 tips are a game changer.

videos.title: Do This 1 Thing to Your Rice… Less Carbs, Less Calories, Better Gut
videos.summary_source_text:
Do This 1 Thing to Your Rice… Less Carbs, Less Calories, Better Gut What if you could eat your favorite rice and still get more benefits with fewer downsides? In this video, you’ll discover a simple technique that can change how your body processes rice, helping you reduce the impact of carbs and calories while supporting better digestion and gut health. When rice is prepared a certain way, it naturally forms resistant starch, which your body doesn’t fully break down into sugar. Instead, it travels to the colon where it feeds healthy gut bacteria, producing powerful compounds that support metabolism, reduce inflammation, and improve overall digestive function. This means you may feel lighter after eating, experience fewer spikes and crashes, and support a healthier internal environment without giving up the foods you love. It’s a simple shift in how you prepare rice—but it can make a big difference in how your body responds. Try it yourself and feel the change.

1 cup (240 g) red lentils (Soak the red lentils in hot water for 1 hour).
1/4 cup (30 g) sunflower seeds.
1 tsp baking powder.
Salt.
1/4 cup (30 g) psyllium.
Olive oil.
Sesame seeds.
Bake in a preheated oven at 360°F / 180°C for 45 minutes.

This AI golf swing app - Swing Coach, gives you instant feedback on every swing, so you can see what’s really happening, understand what needs to change, and make progress much faster.

videos.summary_source_text:
Elon Musk’s $20 Billion Macrohard: Can AI Agents Replace a 50-Year Tech Giant? Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
Elon Musk is building something called “Macrohard,” a bold $20 billion AI initiative that aims to create a fully autonomous software company powered by hundreds of AI agents. But can it really challenge Microsoft’s 50-year dominance in the tech industry?

In this video, we explore what Macrohard actually is, the technology behind Grok and Tesla’s AI systems, and what this means for businesses and individuals. We also compare Macrohard with Microsoft’s vast ecosystem, which serves billions of users worldwide.

videos.title: Superintelligence Is Coming—OpenAI’s Blueprint for the Future Economy
videos.summary_source_text:
Superintelligence Is Coming—OpenAI’s Blueprint for the Future Economy Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
OpenAI has released a powerful policy paper titled “Industrial Policy for the Intelligence Age,” outlining how superintelligence could transform the global economy. In this video, we break down the key proposals that could redefine jobs, income, and the social contract in an AI-driven world.

From a Public Wealth Fund that distributes AI-generated profits to citizens, to a four-day work week powered by productivity gains, OpenAI’s vision goes far beyond technology. The paper also introduces the concept of a universal “Right to AI,” proposes tax reforms to sustain social safety nets, and highlights critical AI safety and governance mechanisms such as containment strategies and trust frameworks.

Whether you're a professional, entrepreneur, policymaker, or AI enthusiast, this video will help you understand what these changes mean for your career, financial future, and society at large.

👉 Subscribe to BitBiased AI for in-depth analysis of AI trends, policies, and emerging technologies.

🌐 Newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/

06:51 – Taxes, Safety Nets, and the Boring Stuff That Actually Matter

10:18 – What This Actually Means for You

videos.title: Lambiase Leaving: What Next For Max + Red Bull? | F1 Nation Podcast
videos.summary_source_text:
Lambiase Leaving: What Next For Max + Red Bull? | F1 Nation Podcast Tom Clarkson is joined by former F1 driver Jolyon Palmer and IndyCar race winner James Hinchcliffe to discuss the news that Max Verstappen’s race engineer, GianPiero Lambiase, will leave Red Bull Racing in 2028 and join McLaren as their Chief Racing Officer.

What does Lambiase’s departure mean for Red Bull? How will it affect Verstappen’s future at the team? And what will GP bring to McLaren?

Plus, the guys are joined by McLaren’s Technical Director of Performance, Mark Temple, who says Mercedes are 'beatable' in 2026 and tells us about the upgrade work being done at the factory before the Miami GP.

videos.title: Tomas Nosek, Panthers Pregame: New York Rangers at Florida
videos.summary_source_text:
Tomas Nosek, Panthers Pregame: New York Rangers at Florida Florida Panthers center Tomas Nosek meets the media before his team plays host to the New York Rangers on Monday, April 13, 2026. 

The Panthers snapped a four=game losing streak (0-3-1) with a 6-2 win on Saturday in Toronto. Nosek scored twice in that win.

Florida will again be without Sam Bennett, Carter Verhaeghe, and Matthew Tkachuk. 

New York Rangers goalie Jonathan Quick announced before the game he would retire at the end of the season and tonight would be his final NHL game. 

Video Courtesy Florida Panthers / @FlaPanthers / Panthers Vision

videos.title: Stop Making it Easy for Defensemen. Do This Instead!
videos.summary_source_text:
Stop Making it Easy for Defensemen. Do This Instead! The Downhill Skating System is the mechanics-first approach that unlocks effortless, controlled speed on the ice without extra conditioning, pushing or “trying harder.” Inspired by the movement signatures of players like Connor McDavid, Nathan MacKinnon, Cale Makar, Quinn Hughes, and other elite NHL skaters, this system teaches you how to move on the ice with gravity, using your body’s own stretch shortening cycles mixed with the most efficient footwork patterns and various skating mechanics.

Most players skate “uphill”: stiff, blocky, pushing hard, creating tension and burning energy like we were always taught in traditional powerskating. Downhill skating flips that model. By using counter rotation, proper joint angles, and natural gravitational momentum, we teach you move faster with less effort.

Inside the Downhill Skating System, players learn to:

1) Unlock the inner spring for better acceleration.
2)Use different footwork patterns to add options, deception and effortlessness.
3)Proper joint alignment for efficiency and balance instead of creating tension with push strides.

Apply NHL-base mechanics like shin angle, Y-angle, rhythm and cadence. Generate speed using the rocker, with heel pressure and subtle weight transfers.

This system is not what players would learn in traditional, outdated power skating methods. It’s a biomechanics-based operating system designed to match your body type and natural movement patterns.

Whether you’re trying to improve the forward stride, lateral movements, deception, or posture, Downhill Skating reveals the hidden mechanics the NHL’s best rely on, and shows you how to plug them into your game step by step.

If you’re ready to skate faster with less effort, flow through transitions, and move with the smoothness of the world’s best players, the Downhill Skating System is your blueprint to faster player development.

videos.title: Vi har tänkt köpa den här bostaden så här ser vår ekonomi ut - har vi råd?
videos.summary_source_text:
Vi har tänkt köpa den här bostaden så här ser vår ekonomi ut - har vi råd? Då brukar jag gå efter tumregeln att om banken säger ja, då är det i de flesta fallen okej.

⚠️ Viktig info:

Detta innehåll är inte individuell investeringsrådgivning. Ett sparande i linje med forskningens rekommendationer har historiskt sett varit framgångsrikt. Det finns mycket som talar för att så även kommer vara framgent, men det finns inga garantier. Historisk avkastning är ingen garanti för framtida avkastning. Alla investeringar innebär risk och kan både öka och minska i värde. Investera inte pengar du inte har råd att förlora. Mer info på rikatillsammans.se.

Författat av Jan Bolmeson per publicerat datum. Vi äger guld som nämnt i videon sedan tidigare. Vi är fristående från nämnda bolag och värdepapper; ingen ersättning har utgått om ej annat anges ovan. Vi avser inte följa upp detta innehåll. Då brukar jag gå efter tumregeln att om banken säger ja, då är det i de flesta fallen okej.

videos.title: Rick Shiels Honest Review Of HackMotion
videos.summary_source_text:
Rick Shiels Honest Review Of HackMotion Get your HackMotion here: https://hackmotion.com/hitgolf

Rick puts the HackMotion wrist sensor to the test, the training aid trusted by Tour pros and serious amateurs alike. We strap it on, hit some shots, and find out whether the real-time wrist angle feedback can actually create lasting swing improvements.

Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

I’ve been working on my swing speed and fitness with a golf workout plan to see if I have what it takes to compete on the Seniors Tour. Following the same conditions as the Legends Tour event, I take on the iconic South Course to see if an amateur can shoot level par on a championship track. This is the truth about my golf journey and why my game needs serious work.

👉 Get Dr. Berg’s Daily Routine as a free download: https://drbrg.co/4tKTazO

It sounds crazy, but your teeth are not dead. They’re living structures that are constantly breaking down and rebuilding through a process called remineralization.

In this video, we uncover the real cause of tooth decay and what you can do to support your teeth naturally.

Refined carbohydrates feed harmful bacteria in your mouth. These microbes produce acid that slowly dissolves your enamel, leading to cavities.

videos.summary_source_text:
IF Only You Knew This Swing Key Years Ago Hips in the golf swing = the #1 key to solid ball striking. In this golf lesson, Eric Cogorno explains how to get your hips forward in the downswing.

🏌️ WORK WITH ERIC COGORNO IN PERSON! Two-Day Golf Schools in Florida and Pennsylvania - Limited Spots Available! 
👉 Register Here: https://bit.ly/48bbScn 

📱 GET THE SWING COACH APP The BEST Golf Swing Training App Ever Created 
👉 Download Here: https://inf.getswingcoach.com/EC1 

🎯 PERSONALIZED ONLINE COACHING Get Custom Golf Instruction from Eric Cogorno 
👉 Learn More: https://www.cogornogolf.com 

📚 STEP-BY-STEP TRAINING PROGRAMS Eric's Complete Golf Improvement System 
👉 Start Here: https://ericcogornogolf.podia.com 

🛒 RECOMMENDED GOLF EQUIPMENT & TRAINING AIDS:
• Takomo Golf - https://takomogolf.com
• Precision Impact Right Wrist Trainer - https://pureswingproducts.com/?sca_ref=1815522.bXQUsGp2bS (Code: COGORNO for $20 OFF)
• theHanger Training Aid - https://www.hangergolf.com/?sca_ref=944104.HqM9GYcX2I (Code: COGORNO for 15% OFF)

⏰ TIMESTAMPS: 
🏌️ 0:00 Why Your Hips in the Golf Swing Determine Everything About Ball Striking 
⚡ 0:29 How Far Forward PGA Tour Pros Actually Get Their Hips (It'll Shock You) 
🎯 0:56 Two Reasons Hip Movement Controls Your Low Point and Club Path 
💪 3:03 How the Swing Coach App Gives Real-Time Hip Feedback on Every Swing 
🔥 3:30 The Critical Head Position Rule as Your Hips Drive Forward 
⛳ 5:44 The "Break the Wall" Lead Side Feel for the Downswing 
💥 6:39 Lead Knee Forward of the Ankle — The Golf Drill That Triggers Hip Shift 
🚀 9:19 Trail Side Through the Ball — The Second Key Feel for Hip Rotation 
✅ 10:53 How to Combine Lead Side and Trail Side for a Complete Hip Drive 
🏆 13:01 Full Recap: The One-to-One Correlation Between Hips Forward and Ball Striking

In This Video, You'll Discover:
• The hip movement in the golf swing that every consistent ball striker shares — and the two specific reasons it controls both contact and direction 
• How to fix fat and thin shots for good by understanding how hip position in the downswing  directly controls where the club bottoms out 
• How to eliminate over-the-top pulls and fades with the lead knee "break the wall" drill — one of Eric Cogorno's go-to golf drills for getting the lower body forward immediately 
• How to unlock the trail side "through the ball" feel that completes hip rotation without losing club face control — essential golf swing tips for any high handicap golfer 
• How to stop hanging back with a two-part mantra ("lead side down and forward, trail side through") that simplifies the entire golf swing sequence 
• How to use golf swing analysis in real time with the Swing Coach AI app to instantly see whether your hips are forward or back on every single swing 
• Exactly how PGA Tour players like Scottie Scheffler, Colin Morikawa, and Tommy Fleetwood drive their hips 4–6 inches forward while keeping their head back — and how you can replicate that in your own game

Eric Cogorno breaks down one of the most misunderstood fundamentals in this golf lesson: getting the hips well forward to start the downswing is non-negotiable for solid, consistent ball striking. Whether you're just learning how to play golf or trying to break 90, this hip movement is the fastest path to hitting ball-first contact. The SwingCoach app, featured throughout this video, color-codes your hip position after every swing and includes in-app instruction from Eric to help you fix it on the spot. For more on lower body sequencing and golf swing tips, check out the next recommended video.

Eric Cogorno breaks down one of the most misunderstood fundamentals in this golf lesson: getting the hips well forward to start the downswing is non-negotiable for solid, consistent ball striking. Whether you're just learning how to play golf or trying to break 90, this hip movement is the fastest path to hitting ball-first contact. The SwingCoach app, featured throughout this video, color-codes your hip position after every swing and includes in-app instruction from Eric to help you fix it on the spot. For more on lower body sequencing and golf swing tips, check out the next recommended video.

#HipsInGolfSwing #Downswing #GolfLesson #HighHandicapGolfer #GolfSwingTips #GolfSwingCoach #GolfSwing #GolfDrills #GolfSwingAnalysis #HowToPlayGolf #EricCogorno #PGATour #Golf

Your purchase helps support my work in bringing you free content to help you learn about golf and improve your game. My goal is to help people through my experience so I will not recommend a product or service unless I've

1. Used it personally. (which will be the case the vast majority of the time)
2. Thoroughly researched it and got first-hand user feedback from other professionals I trust and that have used the product/service

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
• Irons
• Putters
• Wedges
• Golf balls
• Launch monitors
• Golf gadgets
• Budget vs premium clubs

All reviews are completely honest and independent. I use Trackman and GCQuad to give you accurate numbers you can trust.

If you’re trying to find the best golf driver, best irons, most forgiving clubs or value golf equipment — you’re in the right place.

⭐ BREAK 75 & GOLF ENTERTAINMENT

Break 75 has become one of YouTube’s biggest golf series.
You’ll see:

• Full 18-hole course vlogs
• Course management strategies
• Matches against tour players and creators
• Pressure moments, birdie runs and disaster holes
• Some of the world’s best golf courses
• Real, relatable golf

I also play matches and challenges with some of the biggest names in golf, including:

• Bryson DeChambeau
• Peter Finch
• Good Good
• GM Golf
• Bob Does Sports
• BustaJack
• Grant Horvat
• Me and My Golf
• Danny Maude

These help bring you the most entertaining and competitive golf content possible.

⭐ TRAVEL, COURSE VLOGS & LIV CONTENT

I film at some of the most incredible golf destinations around the world, including LIV tournament venues.
Expect:

• Amazing golf courses
• Behind-the-scenes access
• Player interactions
• Travel insights
• Bucket-list destinations
• Worldwide golf adventures

To make golf more fun, more accessible and help you become a better, more confident, happier golfer — whether you’re breaking 100 or trying to break par. Be sure to subscribe to LIV Golf here:

videos.title: This PROVES you DON'T need new clubs 👀
videos.summary_source_text:
This PROVES you DON'T need new clubs 👀 Welcome to H.I.T Golf Reviews – the home of honest, independent and trustworthy golf equipment reviews.

If you want straight-talking advice on drivers, irons, wedges, putters, golf balls and golf tech, you’re in the right place. Every review is based on proper testing, launch monitor data and real on-course experience – not marketing slides.

We test all the big names (TaylorMade, Callaway, Ping, Titleist, Mizuno, Cobra and more) plus the direct-to-consumer brands you’re starting to hear about. New vs old, budget vs premium, “forgiving” vs “players” – we put them head-to-head so you can see what actually performs.

Our testing is built around launch monitor data (GCQuad) and real-world shots, but we always explain the numbers in normal-golfer language. No fluff, no hidden agendas – just whether a club will help your game or not.

Whether you’re:
buying your first proper set,
a mid-handicapper looking for more forgiveness, or
a low-handicap player chasing that perfect combo of feel and distance,

H.I.T is here to help you pick the right gear for your swing, not just the newest thing on the shelf.

Why H.I.T exists:
To cut through the hype.
To give golfers the truth.
To save you time, money and a few golf balls.
To make the game a bit easier – and more fun.

videos.title: HISTORY, AGAIN! Carolina Hurricanes Accomplish SEVEN 20-Goal Scorers in 2025-26
videos.summary_source_text:
HISTORY, AGAIN! Carolina Hurricanes Accomplish SEVEN 20-Goal Scorers in 2025-26 The Carolina Hurricanes made history on Saturday night during their 4-1 win over the Utah Mammoth. They achieved the mark of having seven 20-goal scorers for the second time in team history, the first since relocation. Also, Andrei Svechnikov has a career season, even with a slow start to 2025-26. We also preview the Hurricanes against the Philadelphia Flyers. On the Monday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on the Hurricanes having seven 20-goal scorers for the first time since the 1986-87 Hartford Whalers. What does it mean for how good the team is at spreading the wealth? What are the comparisons between this iteration of the current Hurricanes to the 2005-06 and 2006-07 teams? Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on how Andrei Svehchnikov has silenced the doubts after a career season. While the season started slowly for him, how has his scoring 31 goals and tallying 70 points in 71 games changed the narrative? Finally, Zach previews the game on Monday night between the Hurricanes and the Flyers. Who has the edge? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

#carolinahurricanes #carolinaculture #nhl #nationalhockeyleague The Carolina Hurricanes made history on Saturday night during their 4-1 win over the Utah Mammoth. They achieved the mark of having seven 20-goal scorers for the second time in team history, the first since relocation. Also, Andrei Svechnikov has a career season, even with a slow start to 2025-26. We also preview the Hurricanes against the Philadelphia Flyers. On the Monday Edition of Locked On Hurricanes, Zach begins the show by sharing his thoughts on the Hurricanes having seven 20-goal scorers for the first time since the 1986-87 Hartford Whalers. What does it mean for how good the team is at spreading the wealth? What are the comparisons between this iteration of the current Hurricanes to the 2005-06 and 2006-07 teams? Secondly, Zach shares his thoughts on how Andrei Svehchnikov has silenced the doubts after a career season. While the season started slowly for him, how has his scoring 31 goals and tallying 70 points in 71 games changed the narrative? Finally, Zach previews the game on Monday night between the Hurricanes and the Flyers. Who has the edge? All of that and more, on the latest edition of Locked On Hurricanes.

videos.title: Avalanche Drop Extra Point to Vegas in OT. Jared Bednar Hit With Puck and Will Miss Road Trip
videos.summary_source_text:
Avalanche Drop Extra Point to Vegas in OT. Jared Bednar Hit With Puck and Will Miss Road Trip Colorado Avalanche suffer a double blow as they fall in overtime to the Vegas Golden Knights and lose head coach Jared Bednar to a bizarre bench injury. How will the Avalanche respond with the playoffs looming and key players like Josh Manson also sidelined?

Chris Micieli and Zach Pearson break down the Avalanche’s latest setback, spotlighting standout efforts from Nick Blankenburg and Valeri Nichushkin, and assessing Mackenzie Blackwood’s performance in net. The conversation covers the implications of Bednar’s facial injury, the Nordiques jersey “curse,” and Colorado’s strategy for maintaining momentum with stars resting before the postseason. Plus, the hosts analyze the signing of NCAA free agent TJ Hughes and celebrate the Denver Pioneers’ 11th national title. Don’t miss this action-packed look at how the Avalanche can regroup with adversity mounting before the Stanley Cup chase.

Google is adding voice control to Mixboard, OpenAI is developing a unified Codex agent app, Meta just launched Muse Spark with parallel reasoning, and Runable just introduced RunClaw for delegated AI work inside team chat tools.

Are Your Golf Clubs The Correct Length? Here Is How To Test! How do you know if you’re in the correct length of golf club for your game?

This video highlights the importance of length, how it can impact your club build and the way you swing the golf club.

A lot is written about modern day teaching but your clubs can truly impact how we stand to the ball and deliver consistency.

Whether you’re new to the game or a seasoned player I break down my experience from the last 20 years on the leading global tours working with some of the best athletes to play this game.

This is a process that greats such as Rory McIlroy and Nelly Korda go through to find the right club set up.

videos.title: Great Drill to Stop Leading with Your Arms #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Great Drill to Stop Leading with Your Arms #golfswing #golftips If you’re struggling to compress your irons or make solid contact, this drill will change your feel instantly. Too many golfers get the classic chicken wing in their arms, leading with that and neglecting the body rotation, causing thin and inconsistent strikes. Try the push ball drill — keeping the arms straight and rotating your body through.
This teaches proper rotation, better extension, and that pure, ball-then-turf compression you see from great ball strikers.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. If you’re struggling to compress your irons or make solid contact, this drill will change your feel instantly. videos.title: What If You Took HIGH Amounts of Potassium Every Day?
videos.summary_source_text:
What If You Took HIGH Amounts of Potassium Every Day? What would happen if you took enough potassium every single day?

Most people don’t realize this… but your body needs 4700 mg of potassium daily, and the majority of people aren’t even getting half of that.

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

👉 Get Dr. Berg’s Daily Routine as a free download: https://drbrg.co/4syxJld

This isn’t just “another mineral.” Potassium is essential for one of the most important systems in your body, the sodium-potassium pump, also known as your cell’s battery system.

Fixing your potassium levels might be one of the easiest ways to dramatically improve your health.

Dr. Eric Berg DC Bio:
Dr. Berg, age 60, is a chiropractor who specializes in Healthy Ketosis & Intermittent Fasting. He is the author of the best-selling book "The Healthy Keto Plan" and is the Director of Dr. Berg Nutritionals. He no longer practices but focuses on health education through social media.

videos.title: Eat Pineapple on an Empty Stomach — Watch What Happens
videos.summary_source_text:
Eat Pineapple on an Empty Stomach — Watch What Happens Most people eat pineapple without realizing that the timing can completely change how it works inside the body. In this video, you’ll discover what really happens when you eat pineapple on an empty stomach and why this simple shift can make a powerful difference. Pineapple contains a unique proteolytic enzyme called bromelain that helps break down proteins, support digestion, and reduce inflammation throughout the body. When consumed away from meals, bromelain may act differently, helping the body target unwanted proteins, support healthy circulation, and enhance natural healing processes. You’ll also learn why pineapple can create that tingling sensation in your mouth, what it means, and how to reduce irritation if you’re sensitive. This video breaks down the real physiology in a simple, easy-to-understand way so you can get the most out of this everyday fruit. If you’re looking for natural ways to support digestion, reduce inflammation, and improve overall wellness, this is something you may want to start paying attention to. Always listen to your body and consult your healthcare professional if you have any underlying conditions or sensitivities.

videos.title: Is America Losing the AI Race? The Data Tells a Different Story
videos.summary_source_text:
Is America Losing the AI Race? The Data Tells a Different Story Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
The global AI race between China and the United States is intensifying, and the gap between the two superpowers is much closer than most people think. From computing power and semiconductor dominance to AI models like DeepSeek R1 and Qwen, this video breaks down the real data behind the competition.

We explore how China’s state-backed initiatives, massive data ecosystem, and rapidly growing STEM talent pipeline are challenging America’s traditional strengths in innovation, private investment, and advanced chip technology. Featuring insights and warnings from influential tech leaders such as Elon Musk and Jensen Huang, this analysis provides a clear, evidence-based perspective on the future of global AI leadership.

Whether you're a developer, investor, entrepreneur, or simply curious about the future of artificial intelligence, this video explains how this technological rivalry could reshape global markets, security, and innovation.

Nya RAV4: Bästa bilen – sämsta affären? I den här filmen gör jag en djupdykning i sjätte generationen av världens mest sålda bil – Toyota RAV4. Den har blivit både snyggare, tystare och mer digital, men hur står den sig egentligen mot sitt helelektriska syskon bZ4X?

Jag har räknat på priser, privatleasing och milkostnader för att hitta det som verkligen "skaver" i kalkylen. Är det värt att betala extra för laddhybridens flexibilitet, eller har elbilen sprungit förbi rent ekonomiskt?

Skillnaderna mellan hybrid och laddhybrid (PHEV).
Det nya infotainment-systemet och designen "Hammerhead".
Bagageutrymme och komfort – vad har hänt med utrymmet?

videos.title: The #1 Workout To Grow WIDER Shoulders Fast!
videos.summary_source_text:
The #1 Workout To Grow WIDER Shoulders Fast! If you want wider shoulders fast, this is the exact shoulder workout that made the biggest difference for me.

Most people train shoulders hard, but their shoulders never actually get wider. That’s because most shoulder workouts are built around effort instead of execution.

They rely on pressing movements. They rush through reps. They use momentum instead of control.

And the result is a shoulders workout that builds fatigue, not width.

If your goal is to build bigger shoulders, broader shoulders, and that capped look that makes your upper body stand out, then your shoulder workout has to change.

This isn’t just another workout for shoulders.

This is about understanding how to actually target the lateral delts, because that is the muscle responsible for shoulder width.

In this shoulder workout, I break down the exact method that helped me grow my shoulders faster, and how you can apply it to your own training immediately.

Because here’s the problem…

Even when people try to train side delts, they still turn it into the wrong movement.

They turn lateral raises into front raises.
They let their traps take over the lift.
They swing the weight instead of controlling it.
They lose tension where it matters most.

So even though they’re doing a shoulder workout, they’re not actually training the muscle that creates width.

That’s why their shoulders don’t grow.

And that’s why most shoulders workouts fail.

In this video, you’re going to see:

The best shoulder workout approach for building width
How to properly perform lateral raises for maximum delt activation
The biggest mistakes in most shoulder workouts that limit growth
How to structure your shoulders workout for better results
The key adjustments that make your shoulder exercises actually work
How to get more out of every rep in your shoulder workout

If you’ve been searching for how to get wider shoulders, how to get bigger shoulders, or the best shoulder workout for size and width, this is where you fix it.

Because once you understand how to control the movement and keep tension on the lateral delts, everything changes.

You’ll feel it immediately in your shoulders workout.

And over time, you’ll start to see the difference in your shoulder width, your shape, and your overall physique.

Wider shoulders make your entire upper body look bigger and more athletic.

They create the illusion of a smaller waist.
They improve your proportions.
They give you that broad, powerful look.

But it only happens if your shoulder workout is built correctly.

Not just more volume.

Not just heavier weights.

Better execution.

If your current shoulder workout or shoulders workout routine isn’t giving you the results you want, then it’s time to fix how you’re training.

This is the workout for shoulders that actually delivers width.

Not hype. Not guesswork. Real results.

videos.title: How MacKinnon and McDavid Cross Under (And Why It's Different Than What You Were Taught)
videos.summary_source_text:
How MacKinnon and McDavid Cross Under (And Why It's Different Than What You Were Taught) The Cross-under (Not Crossover): Why the under step Is Everything.

Most coaches teach the crossover by focusing on the over step. We focus on the under step  because that's where the real power and mechanical leverage come from.

In this video I break down the 4 things that actually make a cross-under work:

1) Step size: MacKinnon's bigger, more explosive rhythm vs. McDavid's smaller, higher cadence step.

2) Cadence: How to switch between styles, speeds and rhythms based on the game situation.

3)The Rocker: Landing at the heel with proper shin angle, then rockering heel to toe underneath your center of mass.

4) Staying lose: Flexible ankles (Y-angle), tilting and rotating hips, and being able to separate the upper and lower body with rotation.

This is the foundational mechanic behind the top skaters you watch crossover at speed.

00:00 — The 4 things we focus on
00:20 — Step size: McKinnon vs. McDavid styles
00:50 — Why you should master both cadences
01:15 — The rocker: heel landing, shin angle, heel-to-toe
01:50 — Why we focus on the UNDER foot, not the over foot
02:20 — Staying loose: ankles, hips, shoulders
02:40 — Y angle and ankle mobility drills
03:10 — Hip tilt and rotation
03:30 — Loose shoulders and inner spring
03:50 — Don't overthink it — you're a hockey player
04:10 — Free Downhill Skating training

videos.title: The Money in AI Isn’t Where You Think
videos.summary_source_text:
The Money in AI Isn’t Where You Think Everyone is debating GPT vs Gemini vs Llama—but that’s the wrong game. The real power in AI isn’t in the models, it’s in the infrastructure behind them.

Just like the railroad era, the money isn’t in the trains—it’s in the tracks. Today, that means data centers, chips, energy, and cloud infrastructure. The biggest companies aren’t competing on AI models—they’re investing billions into the foundation that powers everything.

If you understand this shift, you understand where the real opportunity in AI is.

videos.title: Feed What You Need in Your Swing #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Feed What You Need in Your Swing #golfswing #golftips Shot shape is heavily influenced by how you turn in the backswing compared to how you turn through the ball. A greater turn back can encourage a draw, while more turn through often promotes a fade. Experimenting with this relationship helps you identify what your swing needs to keep the ball in play more consistently.
If shot shape or consistency off the tee is something you’re working on, head to the link in our bio. Our coaching plans give you clear structure to understand your tendencies and manage them with confidence.

videos.title: Get Rid Of Cellulite On Hips & Glutes (For Good)
videos.summary_source_text:
Get Rid Of Cellulite On Hips & Glutes (For Good) Struggling with hip and glute cellulite that won’t go away? Discover how to get rid of cellulite fast with the right lower body workout that builds glute muscles and supports smoother, firmer skin.

0:00 Introduction: How to get rid of cellulite
0:17 Why cellulite won’t go away
2:00 Eliminating butt cellulite
4:51 Cellulite and diet
5:30 Lower body workout for cellulite removal

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements.

Download Dr. Berg's Free Daily Health Routine: https://drbrg.co/4dG9vRE

Keep watching for more fat-burning and muscle-building tips:
▶️ https://youtu.be/XPDzypsisI4
▶️ https://youtu.be/leIg3awLeak
▶️ https://youtu.be/FAuClbdfqrI

Cellulite on your thighs and butt isn’t always just fat. It’s often caused by atrophy of your fascia. The best way to get rid of cellulite is to build muscle.

The glutes are the largest muscles in the entire body, and they’re often weakened by a sedentary lifestyle. To eliminate hip and butt cellulite, a full lower body workout is essential rather than focusing solely on glute exercises. Focus on building glute muscle instead of weight loss to eliminate cellulite.

If your diet is high in carbohydrates, it will be difficult to get rid of cellulite, even with the right exercises. Carbohydrates keep insulin and inflammation high, making cellulite removal nearly impossible.

Try this simple lower body workout to get rid of cellulite fast:

Banded Clamshell
• Sets: 2–3
• Reps: 12–20 per side
• Tempo: Slow and controlled (2 sec up, 2 sec down)
• Rest: 20–30 sec

Banded Glute Bridge
• Sets: 2–3
• Reps: 12–15
• Hold: 2–3 seconds at the top
• Rest: 20–30 sec

Lateral Band Walk
• Sets: 2–3
• Steps: 10–15 steps each direction
• Rest: 20–30 sec

Deep Squat with Side Shift 
• Sets: 2–3
• Reps: 8–12 shifts per side
• Tempo: Slow and controlled
• Rest: 20–30 sec

Dr. Berg, age 60, is a chiropractor who specializes in Healthy Ketosis & Intermittent Fasting. He is the Director of Dr. Berg Nutritionals and author of the best-selling book The Healthy Keto Plan. He no longer practices, but focuses on health education through social media.

videos.title: What Happens If You Consumed Omega-3 Fish Oils for 30 Days
videos.summary_source_text:
What Happens If You Consumed Omega-3 Fish Oils for 30 Days Get access to my FREE resources 👉 https://drbrg.co/3Ow3ixf

Just so you know, my full line of high-quality supplements is available on Amazon — search Dr. Berg Supplements. 

70% of the population is deficient in omega-3 fatty acids. Find out why and what would happen if you started consuming more omega-3 fatty acids. 

Check out Dr. Berg's Cod Liver Oil Supplement Here: 🛒 https://drbrg.co/41ixdMj
 
Test Link Here: https://omegaquant.com/what-is-the-omega-3-index/ 

DATA:
https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC3206354/ 
https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC3076650/ 

0:00 Introduction: Omega-3 fatty acids explained 
0:28 Best sources of omega-3 fatty acids 
1:20 Benefits of omega-3 fatty acids 
3:10 What could happen if you consumed more omega-3 fatty acids 
4:47 Side effects of fish oil 
5:45 What causes a deficiency of omega-3 fatty acids? 
6:45 What to do if you can’t absorb fats  
7:35 Learn more about the benefits of grass-fed beef! 

Let’s talk about the benefits of omega-3 fatty acids and what would happen if you started consuming them more often. 

Omega-3 fatty acids are essential for the body, but our bodies can’t produce them. 

You can get omega-3 fatty acids by consuming a high-quality cod liver oil or fish oil supplement. I prefer cod liver oil because it has additional vitamin A and vitamin D. 

However, it’s best to get your omega-3 fatty acids from food. Foods rich in omega-3 fatty acids include: 
 • Fatty fish 
 • Sardines 
 • Grass-fed beef
 • Organ meats 
 • Eggs 

EPA and DHA are important omega-3s. EPA mainly helps reduce inflammation. DHA primarily helps support the brain. Omega-3 fatty acids may even help people with asthma and allergies. 

Consuming more omega-3 fatty acids may potentially help with certain symptoms, including:
 • Dry eyes 
 • Dermatitis 
 • Macular degeneration 
 • Arthritis 
 • Arrhythmias 
 • High blood pressure 
 • Leg cramps 
 • Insomnia  
 • Menstrual cramps 

More potential benefits of consuming omega-3 fatty acids: 
 • Improvements in fatty liver disease 
 • Increased calcium absorption  
 • Decreased risk of certain types of cancer 

One small issue some people experience after taking fish oil is burping. You can take fish oil in capsule form, which shouldn’t cause burping. If you’re vegan or are allergic to fish, a good alternative is consuming algae.

If you have trouble absorbing fats easily, you may want to try taking purified bile salts to increase the absorption of omega-3 fatty acids and fat-soluble vitamins.

videos.title: McDavid Guide to Enter the Offensive Zone
videos.summary_source_text:
McDavid Guide to Enter the Offensive Zone In this breakdown , we’re diving into Connor McDavid’s drive wide guide. Whether you’re a fan of hockey superstar Connor McDavid or simply aiming to up your game, we’ve got an exciting formula to share with you.

You might be wondering, what’s the secret behind McDavid’s net driving success? Hint: it’s not all about his speed. There’s a strategic approach that sets him apart. And the best part? You don’t need to be the fastest skater out there to master this technique. 

Let’s break it down step by step. McDavid’s winning formula begins when he gains possession of the puck between the dots, positioning himself strategically within this zone. Step two involves a crossover or step towards the boards. This creates space between him and the defenseman, a key advantage that you’ll witness in action.

But here comes the game-changer: step three. McDavid initiates crossing over towards the defenseman. This isn’t just about speed; it’s about efficiency and deception. Crossing over proves to be not only faster than regular forward skating but also incredibly deceptive, giving him the edge he needs.

Contrast this with the typical approaches other players take. They might rush straight down from the boards or head directly into the corner, missing out on the strategy that makes McDavid’s drives so effective. His pattern starts between the dots, widens out, and he smartly crosses over towards the defenseman, giving him the upper hand every time.

videos.title: Why shoulder position matters in chipping #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Why shoulder position matters in chipping #golfswing #golftips Chipping becomes much more reliable when the shoulders are positioned correctly throughout the motion. Using a reverse-hand grip — popularised by players like Matt Fitzpatrick — helps the body work together and keeps the stroke more connected. When the setup supports the motion, strike and distance control improve naturally.
If chipping consistency or confidence around the greens is something you’re working on, head to the link in our bio. Our coaching plans give you clear short-game setups and feels that simplify decision-making.

Garlic powder. Sweet paprika powder.
Ground black pepper.

Olive oil.

videos.title: GPT-6 “Spud” Explained: The 2M Token Context Window ChatGPT
videos.summary_source_text:
GPT-6 “Spud” Explained: The 2M Token Context Window ChatGPT Link to our newsletter: https://bitbiased.ai/
GPT-6 is coming—and it might be OpenAI’s most powerful AI model yet. In this video, we break down everything we actually know about GPT-6, codenamed “Spud.” From confirmed information to credible leaks and industry speculation, this analysis separates fact from fiction.

We explore insights from OpenAI executives, the reported completion of pretraining, expected capabilities like persistent memory, multimodal understanding, and massive context windows. We also compare GPT-6 with competitors such as Gemini 3.1 Ultra and Claude Mythos, and discuss its potential impact on industries like healthcare, software engineering, and business operations.

Whether you're a developer, entrepreneur, or AI enthusiast, this video provides a clear and unbiased look at what the future of AI might hold.

videos.title: Paul Maurice: Florida Panthers Morning Skate at Toronto Maple Leafs. ‘Been Rough for Both of Us’
videos.summary_source_text:
Paul Maurice: Florida Panthers Morning Skate at Toronto Maple Leafs. ‘Been Rough for Both of Us’ Florida Panthers coach Paul Maurice meets the media before his team plays the host Toronto Maple Leafs on Saturday, April 11, 2026. 

The Panthers lost both Seth Jones and Dmitry Kulikov to broken bones in Tuesday’s 4-3 shootout loss in Montreal. Jones has a fracture in his foot; Kulikov broke a finger. 

Florida has lost four straight (0-3-1) and had two rookie defensemen making their NHL debut in Marek Alscher and Ludvig Jansson on Thursday. Wilmer Skoog could make his debut tonight. 

This is Florida’s final road game of the season. 

Video Courtesy Florida Panthers / @FlaPanthers / Panthers Vision

videos.title: Is the Amazon Golf Ball any good? 👀
videos.summary_source_text:
Is the Amazon Golf Ball any good? 👀 Plenty of you were curious (and so were we)

For now?
The first dozen looks pretty damn clean.

Coming from the same factory (and featuring same stamping) as the PXG, Malbon ball and the Kirkland Signature - we had high hopes

Yes, they’re sold out, for now.

But for nearly a dollar a ball - these aren’t even CLOSE to your worst option. (So keep an eye out for restock)

But this doesn’t tell the FULL story.

videos.title: Cover the Lead Side Like This  #golfswing #golftips
videos.summary_source_text:
Cover the Lead Side Like This  #golfswing #golftips To compress the ball well, your body needs to be preparing for impact earlier than most golfers realize. By allowing the lead shoulder to cover the lead leg and moving cohesively—shifting and turning together—you arrive at the impact line sooner and with more control. Using an alignment stick against the lead hip gives a clear visual of where impact should be and how early you can get there. This creates a smoother transition and much more consistent contact.
Follow for more practical golf tips from Me and My Golf. To compress the ball well, your body needs to be preparing for impact earlier than most golfers realize. videos.title: How to Strike Your Pitch Shots From 30 - 80 Yards Every Time!
videos.summary_source_text:
How to Strike Your Pitch Shots From 30 - 80 Yards Every Time! Struggling with pitch shots from 30 to 80 yards? That awkward distance that's too far for a chip shot but too short for a full swing is where most golfers drop unnecessary shots every single round — and it's almost always fixable with three simple changes to your golf swing pattern.

Most golf tips for pitching focus on mechanics that make the motion feel more complicated than it needs to be. But when you watch the best players pitch the golf ball, there's nothing complicated happening. Their bodies are stacked, their rhythm is effortless and the club face works with gravity rather than against it. In this golf pitching lesson I want to show you exactly how to recreate that feeling — the same three things I share with every student who comes to me struggling with their short game.

The third technique in this lesson is something a good friend and fellow coach Joe Mayo showed me — and I'll be honest, it completely changed how I think about pitching, chipping and even how to hit irons consistently. If you've been gripping your wedge and trying to lift the ball into the air, this one is going to feel like a revelation.

⬇️ FREE PRACTICE GUIDE — Everything from this golf pitching lesson in one free download you can access here: https://www.dannymaude.com/how-to-strike-pitch-shots-every-time

What you'll learn in this golf pitching lesson:

▶ Why pitch shots from 30 to 80 yards feel so awkward — and the simple golf swing fix
▶ How to stack your body correctly for effortless, consistent pitch shots every time
▶ The tick tock rhythm drill that transforms your pitching and short game immediately
▶ The prop drill for pitch shots — same principle that works for chip shots and irons
▶ The game changing club face technique Joe Mayo showed me that most golfers never know
▶ How these golf tips apply to chipping, irons and your full golf swing too
▶ Why the best players take loft off the club rather than trying to lift it

---

⏱️ CHAPTERS

0:00 — Why pitch shots from 30 to 80 yards feel so difficult
1:02 — What consistent pitching actually looks like
2:09 — Step 1: Stacking your body for consistent pitch shot contact
3:31 — How the prop drill applies to pitch shots and chip shots
4:35 — Step 2: The tick tock rhythm that creates effortless pitching
6:18 — How rhythm controls your pitch shot distance and depth
8:13 — Step 3: The club face secret Joe Mayo showed me
9:39 — Why the best players take loft off not lift it
10:55 — Putting all three together for effortless pitch shots

These golf pitching tips work for all levels — whether you're a beginner trying to understand how to pitch a golf ball for the first time, a mid-handicapper who dreads the awkward 40 to 60 yard shot, or an experienced golfer whose short game lets down an otherwise solid round. If your chip shots feel reasonable but pitch shots still feel jerky and inconsistent, these three golf swing patterns will change that. The same principles that create a consistent golf swing apply directly to your pitching — and once you feel all three working together, that awkward yardage becomes one of the most satisfying shots in the game.

If this helped your pitching and short game, hit the like button and subscribe — I release a new golf lesson every single week to help you save shots and play more consistent golf.

📩 Want personalised help with your short game? Head to https://www.dannymaude.com for lessons and coaching.

---

Aging often shows up in your face first because the face is a sensory organ. Receptors for hormones are highly concentrated in your face because your face shows your emotions. Cortisol can wreak havoc on your skin and facial muscles.

👋 WELCOME — I’M RICK SHIELS

This channel is all about helping you play better golf and enjoy the game more.
I make videos for every type of golfer — beginners, weekend players, improving golfers and low handicaps chasing new personal bests.

Here’s what you’ll find on the channel:

⭐ GOLF COACHING & LESSONS

I share simple, practical and proven golf instruction designed to help you:

• Fix your slice
• Fix your hook
• Hit your driver longer and straighter
• Improve your iron strike
• Add height, control and distance
• Learn how to draw and fade the golf ball
• Improve ball position, alignment and setup
• Build a repeatable, consistent golf swing
• Increase clubhead speed
• Improve swing path and club face control

You’ll also find full swing analysis, beginner advice, drills you can try at the range, and tips for getting better at golf quickly.

⭐ SHORT GAME & PUTTING

Lower your scores with short-game tips that help you:

• Stop duffing and thinning chips
• Improve contact and distance control
• Pitch closer to the hole
• Create more backspin
• Build confidence around the greens
• Read putts better
• Improve pace control and holing-out percentages

Short game is where most golfers drop shots — so I make sure you have everything you need to get better fast.

⭐ GOLF EQUIPMENT REVIEWS (H.I.T)

I test the latest:

• Drivers
